sEn: ERNIE 5.0 is a trillion-parameter unified autoregressive model for multimodal understanding and generation, using a novel elastic training paradigm and ultra-sparse MoE architecture.
sZh: ERNIE 5.0 是一个万亿参数的统一自回归模型，支持多模态理解与生成，采用新颖的弹性训练范式和超稀疏 MoE 架构。
absEn: In this report, we introduce ERNIE 5.0, a natively autoregressive foundation model desinged for unified multimodal understanding and generation across text, image, video, and audio. All modalities are trained from scratch under a unified next-group-of-tokens prediction objective, based on an ultra-sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture with modality-agnostic expert routing. To address practical challenges in large-scale deployment under diverse resource constraints, ERNIE 5.0 adopts a novel elastic training paradigm. Within a single pre-training run, the model learns a family of sub-models with varying depths, expert capacities, and routing sparsity, enabling flexible trade-offs among performance, model size, and inference latency in memory- or time-constrained scenarios. Moreover, we systematically address the challenges of scaling reinforcement learning to unified foundation models, thereby guaranteeing efficient and stable post-training under ultra-sparse MoE architectures and diverse multimodal settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ERNIE 5.0 achieves strong and balanced performance across multiple modalities. To the best of our knowledge, among publicly disclosed models, ERNIE 5.0 represents the first production-scale realization of a trillion-parameter unified autoregressive model that supports both multimodal understanding and generation. To facilitate further research, we present detailed visualizations of modality-agnostic expert routing in the unified model, alongside comprehensive empirical analysis of elastic training, aiming to offer profound insights to the community.
absZh: 本报告介绍了 ERNIE 5.0，一个原生自回归基础模型，专为跨文本、图像、视频和音频的统一多模态理解与生成而设计。所有模态在统一的下一组令牌预测目标下从头开始训练，基于具有模态无关专家路由的超稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构。为了应对不同资源约束下大规模部署的实际挑战，ERNIE 5.0 采用了一种新颖的弹性训练范式。在单次预训练运行中，模型学习了一系列具有不同深度、专家容量和路由稀疏性的子模型，从而在内存或时间受限的场景中实现性能、模型大小和推理延迟之间的灵活权衡。此外，我们系统地解决了将强化学习扩展到统一基础模型的挑战，从而保证了在超稀疏 MoE 架构和多样化多模态设置下的高效稳定后训练。大量实验表明，ERNIE 5.0 在多种模态上实现了强大且均衡的性能。据我们所知，在公开披露的模型中，ERNIE 5.0 代表了首个支持多模态理解与生成的生产级万亿参数统一自回归模型。为了促进进一步研究，我们提供了统一模型中模态无关专家路由的详细可视化，以及弹性训练的全面实证分析，旨在为社区提供深刻的见解。

limits.zh: 模型在低资源语言或小众模态上的性能未得到广泛评估。

items.en: Recent advances in large language and vision-language models, including ERNIE (ernie45tech), Gemini (gemini2.5; gemini3.0), GPT (gpt4o; gpt5), Claude (claude), DeepSeek (deepseekv3; deepseekv3.2), and Qwen (qwen3; qwen3-vl), demonstrate that large-scale autoregressive sequence modeling provides a powerful foundation for language and multimodal understanding. By modeling diverse inputs as sequences of tokens, these models exhibit strong reasoning and alignment capabilities across modalities. However, in most existing systems, autoregressive modeling serves multimodal understanding while the output is still text-centric, which restricts the model’s ability to engage in various multimodal interactions. To overcome this limitation, recent approaches augment pre-trained language models with modality-specific decoders or generators, which are connected to the language backbone through late-fusion designs (qwen3-omni; seedream4). Although effective for individual modalities, these designs decouple multimodal generation from understanding and rely on modality-specific, non-autoregressive objectives, which hinder deep cross-modal integration and often force a trade-off between multimodal integration and core language performance. Against this backdrop, designing a unified autoregressive paradigm remains a prominent open challenge. Such a framework must natively support both multimodal understanding and generation, preserve strong unimodal capabilities, and scale effectively as model and data sizes continue to grow.
items.zh: 近期在大语言模型和视觉-语言模型方面的进展，包括 ERNIE (ernie45tech)、Gemini (gemini2.5; gemini3.0)、GPT (gpt4o; gpt5)、Claude (claude)、DeepSeek (deepseekv3; deepseekv3.2) 和 Qwen (qwen3; qwen3-vl)，表明大规模自回归序列建模为语言和多模态理解提供了强大的基础。通过将多样化的输入建模为 token 序列，这些模型在跨模态中展现出强大的推理和对齐能力。然而，在大多数现有系统中，自回归建模服务于多模态理解，而输出仍然以文本为中心，这限制了模型参与各种多模态交互的能力。为了克服这一局限，近期方法通过后期融合设计 (qwen3-omni; seedream4) 为预训练语言模型增加了模态特定的解码器或生成器，并将其连接到语言主干。尽管对单个模态有效，但这些设计将多模态生成与理解解耦，并依赖于模态特定的非自回归目标，阻碍了深层的跨模态整合，并常常迫使在多模态整合与核心语言性能之间进行权衡。在此背景下，设计一个统一的自回归范式仍然是一个突出的开放挑战。这样的框架必须原生支持多模态理解和生成，保持强大的单模态能力，并随着模型和数据规模的持续增长而有效扩展。

items.en: In this report, we introduce ERNIE 5.0, a next-generation foundation model natively designed to integrate text, image, audio, and video capabilities under a unified autoregressive framework for both multimodal understanding and generation. Rather than augmenting a pre-trained language model with modality-specific components, ERNIE 5.0 trains all modalities simultaneously from scratch, which alleviates the ``ability seesaw'' problem observed in later-fusion approaches and ensures that all modalities evolve collectively without sacrificing performance. Specifically, heterogeneous inputs are mapped into a shared token space, and modeling across all modalities is formulated under a unified Next-Group-of-Tokens Prediction objective, which avoids explicit modality boundaries and inconsistent optimization trajectories. To support scalability, ERNIE 5.0 leverages an ultra-sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) backbone with modality-agnostic expert routing. Routing decisions are conditioned on unified token representations rather than modality identifiers, allowing tokens from various modalities to be dispatched to a shared pool of experts. This ultra-sparse, modality-agnostic architecture eliminates the need for heuristic modality-specific expert allocation, offering sufficient capacity for both differentiation and collaboration among modality-specialized behaviors.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍 ERNIE 5.0，这是一个下一代基础模型，原生设计用于在统一的自回归框架下整合文本、图像、音频和视频能力，实现多模态理解和生成。ERNIE 5.0 并非通过模态特定组件增强预训练语言模型，而是从头开始同时训练所有模态，从而缓解了后期融合方法中观察到的“能力跷跷板”问题，并确保所有模态共同进化而不牺牲性能。具体来说，异构输入被映射到共享的 token 空间，所有模态的建模在统一的下一组 token 预测目标下进行，避免了显式的模态边界和不一致的优化轨迹。为了支持可扩展性，ERNIE 5.0 利用超稀疏混合专家（MoE）主干，采用模态无关的专家路由。路由决策基于统一的 token 表示而非模态标识符，允许来自不同模态的 token 被分派到共享的专家池。这种超稀疏、模态无关的架构消除了对启发式模态特定专家分配的需求，为模态特定行为的区分和协作提供了足够的容量。

items.en: During pre-training of ERNIE 5.0, we propose a novel elastic training paradigm that enables a single pre-training run to produce a family of models with varying capacity–efficiency trade-offs. Instead of optimizing a static architecture, our elastic training approach dynamically samples sub-models with varying depth, width, and routing sparsity for each training instance, guided by a pre-defined schedule. Both the sampled sub-models and the full-model are optimized in one backpropagation process under the same autoregressive objective. The sub-model sampling strategy improves the functional integrity of parameters and maintains competitive performance even when only a subset of parameters is available. Elasticity in depth and width facilitates the production of models with smaller sizes, whereas the sparsity elasticity reduces the number of activated experts during inference, leading to higher throughput and improved computational efficiency. Meanwhile, elastic training enables sub-models to inherit knowledge from the full model and provides flexible instantiation of smaller models in subsequent post-training stages, thereby eliminating the need to pre-train multiple models of various sizes or rely on customized compression, and making ERNIE 5.0 well suited for deployment under diverse hardware, memory, and latency constraints.
items.zh: 在 ERNIE 5.0 的预训练过程中，我们提出了一种新颖的弹性训练范式，使得单次预训练运行能够产生一系列具有不同容量-效率权衡的模型。我们的弹性训练方法并非优化静态架构，而是根据预定义的调度，为每个训练实例动态采样具有不同深度、宽度和路由稀疏性的子模型。采样子模型和完整模型在相同的自回归目标下通过一次反向传播过程进行优化。子模型采样策略改善了参数的功能完整性，即使在仅使用部分参数时也能保持有竞争力的性能。深度和宽度的弹性有助于生成更小尺寸的模型，而稀疏性弹性则减少了推理期间激活的专家数量，从而提高了吞吐量和计算效率。同时，弹性训练使子模型能够继承完整模型的知识，并在后续的后训练阶段提供灵活的小模型实例化，从而消除了预训练多个不同尺寸模型或依赖定制压缩的需求，使 ERNIE 5.0 非常适合在多样化的硬件、内存和延迟约束下部署。

items.en: Following unified pre-training, we conduct a multi-stage post-training pipeline that combines supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with unified multimodal reinforcement learning (UMRL). The coexistence of heterogeneous multimodal inputs and ultra-sparse MoE architecture introduces substantial optimization challenges, which increases the sensitivity of UMRL to sampling bias, sparse reward signals, and entropy collapse. To cope with these issues, we build a unified verifier system and develop a suite of scalable techniques to improve the stability and efficiency of RL training. An unbiased replay buffer is employed to improve rollout efficiency while preserving a balanced data distribution. Multi-granularity importance sampling, together with positive sample masking, stabilizes policy optimization and effectively mitigates entropy collapse. For difficult tasks with sparse rewards, adaptive hint-based RL is introduced to provide auxiliary guidance when needed. By ensuring stable and efficient post-training, these designs support the excellent multimodal reasoning ability in ERNIE 5.0.
items.zh: 在统一预训练之后，我们进行了一个多阶段的后训练流程，结合了监督微调（SFT）和统一多模态强化学习（UMRL）。异构多模态输入和超稀疏 MoE 架构的共存带来了显著的优化挑战，增加了 UMRL 对采样偏差、稀疏奖励信号和熵崩溃的敏感性。为了应对这些问题，我们构建了一个统一的验证器系统，并开发了一套可扩展的技术来提高 RL 训练的稳定性和效率。采用无偏重放缓冲区来提高 rollout 效率，同时保持平衡的数据分布。多粒度重要性采样与正样本掩码相结合，稳定了策略优化并有效缓解了熵崩溃。对于具有稀疏奖励的困难任务，引入了自适应提示强化学习，在需要时提供辅助指导。通过确保稳定高效的后训练，这些设计支持了 ERNIE 5.0 中出色的多模态推理能力。

items.en: For infrastructure, we utilize hybrid parallelism with fine-grained memory control to support effective training of a trillion-parameter ultra-sparse MoE model. For unified multimodal training, tokenizers are decoupled from the MoE backbone and deployed on separate GPU nodes, so that each component can adopt its most suitable parallelization strategy. To accommodate local bidirectional attention in vision, we employ FlashMask (flashmask) to efficiently handle per-sample heterogeneous attention masks. Finally, we design a scalable and disaggregated RL infrastructure that coordinates training, rollout, and environment interaction, to ensure high-throughput and numerically consistent post-training.
items.zh: 在基础设施方面，我们利用混合并行和细粒度内存控制来支持万亿参数超稀疏 MoE 模型的有效训练。对于统一多模态训练，分词器与 MoE 主干解耦并部署在单独的 GPU 节点上，以便每个组件可以采用其最合适的并行化策略。为了适应视觉中的局部双向注意力，我们采用 FlashMask (flashmask) 来高效处理每个样本的异构注意力掩码。最后，我们设计了一个可扩展且分离的 RL 基础设施，协调训练、rollout 和环境交互，以确保高吞吐量和数值一致的后训练。

items.en: We evaluate ERNIE 5.0 on a diverse set of text and multimodal benchmarks spanning perception, reasoning, understanding, and generation. Across these tasks, ERNIE 5.0 consistently matches or outperforms specialized baselines, indicating that unified training retains strong modality-specific performance without architectural fragmentation. Ablation results further highlight the effectiveness of modality-agnostic expert routing and elastic training. Despite employing a single shared routing mechanism across modalities, experts exhibit clear specialization patterns that are primarily shaped by task requirements rather than modality boundaries. Reducing routing top-kk to 25% during inference yields over 15% decoding speedup with only minor accuracy loss, while elastic training across depth, width, and sparsity preserves near-full performance using only 53.7% activated parameters and 35.8% total parameters, suggesting a scalable and efficient foundation for next-generation unified multimodal models.
items.zh: 我们在涵盖感知、推理、理解和生成的多样化文本和多模态基准上评估 ERNIE 5.0。在这些任务中，ERNIE 5.0 始终匹配或超越专门的基线，表明统一训练保留了强大的模态特定性能，而无需架构碎片化。消融结果进一步突出了模态无关专家路由和弹性训练的有效性。尽管跨模态采用单一共享路由机制，但专家表现出清晰的专门化模式，这些模式主要由任务需求而非模态边界塑造。在推理期间将路由 top-k 减少到 25% 可带来超过 15% 的解码加速，且仅造成轻微精度损失，而跨深度、宽度和稀疏性的弹性训练仅使用 53.7% 的激活参数和 35.8% 的总参数即可保持接近完整的性能，这表明了下一代统一多模态模型的可扩展且高效的基础。

items.en: In the following sections, we systematically present the design of the model architecture and its core technical components, followed by a detailed description of the training and optimization pipeline. We then evaluate ERNIE 5.0 on a comprehensive set of benchmarks to validate the effectiveness of the proposed unified framework. Finally, we share some key technical insights during the model training process, hoping to be helpful for future research on scalable and general-purpose foundation models.
items.zh: 在以下章节中，我们系统地介绍了模型架构的设计及其核心技术组件，随后详细描述了训练和优化流程。然后，我们在全面的基准集上评估 ERNIE 5.0，以验证所提出的统一框架的有效性。最后，我们分享了模型训练过程中的一些关键技术见解，希望对未来可扩展通用基础模型的研究有所帮助。

items.en: As shown in Figure 1, ERNIE 5.0 adopts an ultra-sparse mixture-of-experts architecture that integrates language, image, video, and audio within a single autoregressive framework for both multimodal understanding and generation. The model consists of a shared backbone for unified sequence modeling, together with visual and audio tokenizers that convert multimodal inputs into a unified token sequence. All modalities are trained under a shared Next-Group-of-Tokens Prediction objective, enabling deep cross-modal interactions with end-to-end optimization. In this section, we first describe the autoregressive backbone in Sec. 2.1, which serves as the core of ERNIE 5.0, followed by the visual and audio processing pipelines in Secs. 2.2 and 2.3.
items.zh: 如图 1 所示，ERNIE 5.0 采用超稀疏混合专家架构，在单一自回归框架内整合语言、图像、视频和音频，用于多模态理解和生成。该模型由一个用于统一序列建模的共享主干，以及将多模态输入转换为统一 token 序列的视觉和音频分词器组成。所有模态在共享的下一组 token 预测目标下进行训练，通过端到端优化实现深层的跨模态交互。在本节中，我们首先在第 2.1 节中描述自回归主干，它是 ERNIE 5.0 的核心，随后在第 2.2 和 2.3 节中介绍视觉和音频处理流程。

items.capEn: Figure 1: ERNIE 5.0 architecture. It is trained from scratch under a unified autoregressive paradigm that integrates multimodal understanding and generation. Text, vision, and audio are encoded and serialized, then processed by a unified backbone. An ultra-sparse MoE architecture with modality-agnostic routing is employed, in which tokens from different modalities are dispatched to a shared expert pool.
items.capZh: 图 1：ERNIE 5.0 架构。它在统一的自回归范式下从头开始训练，整合了多模态理解和生成。文本、视觉和音频被编码并序列化，然后由统一主干处理。采用具有模态无关路由的超稀疏 MoE 架构，其中来自不同模态的 token 被分派到共享的专家池。

full.sec: 2.1 Unified Autoregressive Backbone with Ultra-Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
full.secZh: 2.1 统一自回归骨干与超稀疏混合专家

items.en: Heterogeneous modalities differ substantially in token semantics, temporal structures, and optimization dynamics, making naive cross-modal parameter sharing prone to unstable optimization and performance degradation, especially when modeling understanding and generation in a single model.
items.zh: 异构模态在 token 语义、时间结构和优化动态方面存在显著差异，使得朴素的跨模态参数共享容易导致不稳定的优化和性能下降，尤其是在单个模型中建模理解和生成时。

items.en: To address these challenges, ERNIE 5.0 is designed to be trained from scratch under a unified autoregressive framework. Multimodal inputs, including text, image, video, and audio, are projected into a shared token space, serialized into a unified sequence, and optimized under the Next-Group-of-Tokens Prediction objective. Specifically, text generation adheres to the standard Next-Token Prediction (NTP) paradigm, augmented by the Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) mechanism (gloeckle2024better; deepseekv3) to enhance both output quality and inference efficiency. For vision and audio modalities, generation is formulated as a group-of-tokens prediction task, so as to align their generative processes with the text autoregressive objective. Vision generation employs Next-Frame-and-Scale Prediction (NFSP) (ji2026videoar), and audio generation utilizes Next-Codec Prediction (NCP) to capture temporal and spectral structure. By unifying heterogeneous modalities under a single optimization objective, all tokens are trained within a consistent sequence prediction paradigm, enabling training from scratch and deep token-level multimodal interactions throughout the unified backbone.
items.zh: 为了应对这些挑战，ERNIE 5.0 被设计为在统一的自回归框架下从头开始训练。多模态输入，包括文本、图像、视频和音频，被投影到共享的 token 空间，序列化为统一序列，并在下一组 token 预测目标下进行优化。具体来说，文本生成遵循标准的下一 token 预测（NTP）范式，并通过多 token 预测（MTP）机制 (gloeckle2024better; deepseekv3) 增强，以提高输出质量和推理效率。对于视觉和音频模态，生成被表述为组 token 预测任务，以使其生成过程与文本自回归目标对齐。视觉生成采用下一帧和尺度预测（NFSP）(ji2026videoar)，音频生成采用下一编解码器预测（NCP）来捕获时间和频谱结构。通过将异构模态统一在单一优化目标下，所有 token 都在一致的序列预测范式中进行训练，实现了从头开始训练，并在整个统一主干中进行深层的 token 级多模态交互。

items.en: Although unifying the learning paradigm helps reduce modality discrepancies, it cannot fully eliminate the intrinsic differences across modalities, necessitating substantial model capacity to capture diverse multimodal knowledge. To this end, ERNIE 5.0 adopts a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to scale model capacity efficiently while controlling both training and inference costs. At the core of this architecture is modality-agnostic expert routing, where routing decisions are conditioned on unified token representations rather than explicit modality identifiers. The router dispatches tokens from different modalities to a shared pool of experts, enabling effective cross-modal parameter sharing. In contrast to modality-isolated routing strategies in our previous models (ernie45tech), such a unified routing mechanism promotes cross-modal knowledge generalization and improves single-modality performance through the emergent specialization of shared experts. Moreover, it obviates the requirement of heuristic modality-specific expert allocation, which is often non-trivial in practice, especially when more than two modalities are involved. By employing an ultra-sparse and fine-grained MoE architecture, ERNIE 5.0 achieves an activation rate below 3%, allowing the model to substantially expand its effective capacity without incurring a proportional increase in computational overhead. The training is further stabalized by an auxiliary-loss-free load balancing (wang2024auxiliary) , ensuring robust expert utilization at a trillion-parameter scale.
items.zh: 尽管统一学习范式有助于减少模态差异，但它无法完全消除模态间的内在差异，因此需要大量的模型容量来捕获多样化的多模态知识。为此，ERNIE 5.0 采用稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构，在控制训练和推理成本的同时有效扩展模型容量。该架构的核心是模态无关的专家路由，其中路由决策基于统一的 token 表示而非显式的模态标识符。路由器将来自不同模态的 token 分派到共享的专家池，从而实现有效的跨模态参数共享。与我们之前模型 (ernie45tech) 中的模态隔离路由策略相比，这种统一的路由机制促进了跨模态知识泛化，并通过共享专家的涌现专门化提高了单模态性能。此外，它消除了对启发式模态特定专家分配的需求，这在实践中通常不简单，尤其是当涉及两个以上模态时。通过采用超稀疏和细粒度的 MoE 架构，ERNIE 5.0 实现了低于 3% 的激活率，使模型能够大幅扩展有效容量，而不会成比例增加计算开销。训练通过无辅助损失的负载均衡 (wang2024auxiliary) 进一步稳定，确保在万亿参数规模下专家利用的鲁棒性。

items.en: Based on the unified optimization objective and the shared parameter space, ERNIE 5.0 formally integrates multimodal understanding and generation within a single autoregressive backbone. Despite such formal unification, some challenges remain in learning representations that can convincingly support both tasks. Typically, multimodal understanding focuses on abstract and semantic-level concepts, whereas generation requires accurate modeling of fine-grained perceptual details. ERNIE 5.0 is therefore designed to learn a unified representation that captures high-level semantics while preserving fine-grained details, enabling both comprehension and synthesis in a unified manner. In the unified framework, semantic-level signals guide generative modeling toward global consistency, while generative training, in turn, strengthens fine-grained perception and detail-sensitive reasoning. This mutual reinforcement allows a single backbone to robustly support perception, reasoning, and creative generation. Based on this design philosophy, we further introduce unified visual and audio input–output interfaces and their corresponding processing pipelines in the following sections, which constitute a distinctive feature of ERNIE 5.0 compared to previous models.
items.zh: 基于统一的优化目标和共享的参数空间，ERNIE 5.0 在单个自回归主干内正式整合了多模态理解和生成。尽管形式上统一，但在学习能够令人信服地支持这两类任务的表示方面仍然存在一些挑战。通常，多模态理解侧重于抽象和语义级概念，而生成则需要准确建模细粒度的感知细节。因此，ERNIE 5.0 被设计为学习一种统一的表示，既能捕获高层语义，又能保留细粒度细节，从而以统一的方式支持理解和合成。在统一框架中，语义级信号引导生成建模朝向全局一致性，而生成训练反过来又加强了细粒度感知和细节敏感推理。这种相互强化使得单个主干能够稳健地支持感知、推理和创造性生成。基于这一设计理念，我们在以下章节中进一步介绍了统一的视觉和音频输入-输出接口及其相应的处理流程，这是 ERNIE 5.0 与之前模型相比的一个显著特征。

items.en: In ERNIE 5.0, image is treated as a special case of video (e.g., a single-frame video), sharing the unified design philosophy of visual understanding and generation. Visual understanding is built upon a hybird representation that encodes both global semantic information and local perceptual details, allowing high-level reasoning while preserving fine-grained visual sensitivity. For image and video generation, a visual autoregressive paradigm is proposed to support coherent modeling across both spatial and temporal dimensions in discrete token space, as shown in Figure 2. In the following, we first introduce vision tokenization, followed by our tailored designs for visual understanding and generation.
items.zh: 在 ERNIE 5.0 中，图像被视为视频的一种特殊情况（例如，单帧视频），共享视觉理解和生成的统一设计理念。视觉理解建立在混合表示之上，该表示编码全局语义信息和局部感知细节，允许高层推理同时保留细粒度的视觉敏感性。对于图像和视频生成，提出了一种视觉自回归范式，以支持在离散 token 空间中跨空间和时间维度的连贯建模，如图 2 所示。在下文中，我们首先介绍视觉分词，然后介绍我们为视觉理解和生成量身定制的设计。

items.en: To support autoregressive visual modeling across both spatial and temporal dimensions, ERNIE 5.0 propose Next-Frame-and-Scale Prediction (NFSP), where image generation is formulated as a Next-scale Prediction problem, and video generation further extends this formulation with Next-Frame Prediction (ji2026videoar). To this end, we first train a causal 2D multi-scale tokenizer for images, which provides strong spatial representations through large-scale image pre-training. Building upon this image tokenizer, we inflate it into a causal 3D convolutional tokenizer, thereby unifying image and video tokenization within a single model. The progressive design preserves the spatial modeling capabilities learned from images while introducing temporal perception for videos, leading to faithful reconstruction of high-level visual elements such as scene text and human faces.
items.zh: 为了支持跨空间和时间维度的自回归视觉建模，ERNIE 5.0 提出了下一帧和尺度预测（NFSP），其中图像生成被表述为下一尺度预测问题，视频生成进一步通过下一帧预测 (ji2026videoar) 扩展了这一表述。为此，我们首先为图像训练了一个因果 2D 多尺度分词器，通过大规模图像预训练提供了强大的空间表示。在此图像分词器的基础上，我们将其膨胀为因果 3D 卷积分词器，从而在单个模型中统一了图像和视频分词。这种渐进式设计保留了从图像中学到的空间建模能力，同时引入了视频的时间感知，从而实现了对场景文本和人脸等高层视觉元素的忠实重建。

items.en: During tokenizer training, we incorporate auxiliary supervision signals to enhance representation quality and training stability. Specifically, we utilize the adversarial loss (stylegan) from GAN-based discriminators to improve distributional fidelity. Meanwhile, we incorporate a semantic branch and apply a semantic regularization loss derived from large-scale vision foundation models to preserve high-level semantic consistency. These complementary objectives improve the learnability and stability of visual tokens, as well as facilitate effective autoregressive modeling in the unified backbone.
items.zh: 在分词器训练期间，我们加入了辅助监督信号以提高表示质量和训练稳定性。具体来说，我们利用来自 GAN 判别器的对抗损失 (stylegan) 来提高分布保真度。同时，我们引入了一个语义分支，并应用来自大规模视觉基础模型的语义正则化损失来保持高层语义一致性。这些互补的目标提高了视觉 token 的可学习性和稳定性，并促进了统一主干中的有效自回归建模。

items.en: Following the bit-wise quantization strategy, we quantize the unified visual latent representation into a group of bit-codes, where the number of bits directly corresponding to the size of discrete vocabulary (han2025infinity). Based on this mechanism, we pre-train a series of tokenizers with progressively increasing bit numbers. During the training of ERNIE 5.0, we adopt a progressive tokenizer switching strategy, starting with a low-bit tokenizer (i.e., small vocabulary) and gradually transitioning to higher-bit variants (i.e., larger vocabularies). By first learning coarse-grained, low-bit representations with small vocabularies and progressively introducing finer-grained, higher-bit tokenizers, the backbone follows a smoother and stable optimization trajectory, effectively alleviating early-stage training instability and leading to improved visual generation quality.
items.zh: 遵循逐位量化策略，我们将统一的视觉潜在表示量化为一组位码，其中位数直接对应于离散词汇表的大小 (han2025infinity)。基于这一机制，我们预训练了一系列位数逐渐增加的分词器。在 ERNIE 5.0 的训练过程中，我们采用渐进式分词器切换策略，从低位分词器（即小词汇表）开始，逐渐过渡到高位变体（即大词汇表）。通过首先使用小词汇表学习粗粒度的低位表示，然后逐步引入更细粒度的更高位分词器，主干遵循更平滑和稳定的优化轨迹，有效缓解了早期训练不稳定性，并提高了视觉生成质量。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Overview of the unified vision understanding and generation architecture. For understanding, visual features are extracted by a hybrid CNN–ViT representation and then compressed via an Attention-Based Patch Merger. For generation, we introduce the Next-Frame-and-Scale Prediction (NFSP) paradigm, where image generation is formulated as Next-Scale Prediction, and video generation further extends this process with Next-Frame prediction along the temporal dimension.
items.capZh: 图 2：统一视觉理解和生成架构概览。对于理解，视觉特征由混合 CNN-ViT 表示提取，然后通过基于注意力的补丁合并器进行压缩。对于生成，我们引入了下一帧和尺度预测（NFSP）范式，其中图像生成被表述为下一尺度预测，视频生成则通过沿时间维度的下一帧预测进一步扩展。

items.en: While the above design mainly targets visual tokenization for unified autoregressive modeling and generation, we observe that, prior to quantization, visual features are typically compressed by a downsampling module into low-dimensional representations, whose dimensionality is aligned with the tokenizer bit-width. The compression inevitably leads to the loss of fine-grained semantic information, which has also been widely observed to limit the performance of visual understanding tasks (unitok2025).
items.zh: 虽然上述设计主要针对统一自回归建模和生成的视觉分词，但我们观察到，在量化之前，视觉特征通常通过下采样模块压缩为低维表示，其维度与分词器位宽对齐。这种压缩不可避免地导致细粒度语义信息的丢失，这也被广泛认为限制了视觉理解任务的性能 (unitok2025)。

items.en: To address this issue, ERNIE 5.0 directly leverages the dual-path visual features prior to quantization. We integrate perceptual features extracted by Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with semantic features encoded by a Vision Transformer (ViT). However, the representations produced by these two paths are misaligned in spatial structure, our empirical study shows that roughly fusing CNN and ViT features through MLP-based adapters often fails to fully exploit their complementary strengths and introduces representational interference, resulting in degraded understanding performance. This observation motivates the following Attention-based Patch Merger.
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，ERNIE 5.0 直接利用量化前的双路径视觉特征。我们将卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的感知特征与视觉 Transformer（ViT）编码的语义特征相结合。然而，这两条路径产生的表示在空间结构上不对齐，我们的实证研究表明，通过基于 MLP 的适配器粗略融合 CNN 和 ViT 特征通常无法充分利用它们的互补优势，并引入表示干扰，导致理解性能下降。这一观察结果促使我们设计了以下基于注意力的补丁合并器。

items.en: Formally, given a spatial token in an image or a spatio-temporal token in a video, we extract two sets of features, 𝐅c​n​n∈ℝN×K×Dc​n​n\mathbf{F}_{cnn}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times K\times D_{cnn}} and 𝐅v​i​t∈ℝN×K×Dv​i​t\mathbf{F}_{vit}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times K\times D_{vit}}, where NN is the number of visual understanding tokens and KK is the number of local patches grouped for each token, Dc​n​nD_{cnn} and Dv​i​tD_{vit} are the feature dimensions. In image understanding tasks, we group K=4K=4 spatially adjacent patches, while in video understanding tasks, we group K=16K=16 patches spanning 44 neighboring frames. Before feature fusion, we project CNN features to match the ViT feature space, and then concatenate the aligned CNN and ViT patch features along the patch dimension to obtain 𝐅m​r​g∈ℝN×2​K×Dv​i​t\mathbf{F}_{mrg}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times 2K\times D_{vit}}. Next, multi-head self-attention is applied to the concatenated patch tokens, 𝐙=Attn​(𝐅m​r​g)\mathbf{Z}=\mathrm{Attn}(\mathbf{F}_{mrg}), where the attention mechanism jointly models correlations between CNN and ViT features, as well as spatial and temporal dependencies among the group of patches. The output preserves the same shape, 𝐙∈ℝN×2​K×Dv​i​t\mathbf{Z}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times 2K\times D_{vit}}. Finally, we perform mean pooling over the patch dimension to obtain a compact representation 𝐅o​u​t∈ℝN×Dv​i​t\mathbf{F}_{out}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times D_{vit}}, which is then projected to align with the embedding dimension of the unified backbone.
items.zh: 形式上，给定图像中的空间词元或视频中的时空词元，我们提取两组特征：𝐅c​n​n∈ℝN×K×Dc​n​n和𝐅v​i​t∈ℝN×K×Dv​i​t，其中N是视觉理解词元的数量，K是为每个词元分组的局部补丁数量，Dc​n​n和Dv​i​t是特征维度。在图像理解任务中，我们将K=4个空间相邻的补丁分组；在视频理解任务中，我们将跨越4个相邻帧的K=16个补丁分组。在特征融合之前，我们将CNN特征投影到与ViT特征空间匹配，然后沿补丁维度拼接对齐后的CNN和ViT补丁特征，得到𝐅m​r​g∈ℝN×2​K×Dv​i​t。接下来，对拼接后的补丁词元应用多头自注意力，𝐙=Attn​(𝐅m​r​g)，其中注意力机制联合建模CNN和ViT特征之间的相关性，以及补丁组内的空间和时间依赖关系。输出保持相同形状，𝐙∈ℝN×2​K×Dv​i​t。最后，我们对补丁维度进行平均池化，得到紧凑表示𝐅o​u​t∈ℝN×Dv​i​t，然后将其投影以与统一骨干网络的嵌入维度对齐。

items.en: The choice of feature fusion has a significant impact on model performance, and the naive MLP-based fusion is proven inadequate to effectively integrate CNN and ViT features. In contrast, the proposed attention-based aggregation module consistently outperforms both CNN-only and ViT-only baselines on a wide range of benchmarks without introducing noticeable computational overhead, with particularly pronounced gains in document and chart understanding as well as general visual understanding tasks. Importantly, ERNIE 5.0 is designed as a unified framework for visual understanding and generation, where visual representations must support not only discriminative tasks but also fine-grained generative tasks such as pixel-level image and video editing. By utilizing attention, the module adaptively aggregates local patches together with high-level semantic information, capturing critical visual features while reducing the number of visual tokens. It results in a compact yet expressive visual representation that provides a strong and stable foundation for various vision-language tasks.
items.zh: 特征融合的选择对模型性能有显著影响，基于MLP的朴素融合被证明不足以有效整合CNN和ViT特征。相比之下，所提出的基于注意力的聚合模块在广泛的基准测试中始终优于仅CNN和仅ViT的基线，且未引入明显的计算开销，在文档和图表理解以及通用视觉理解任务中尤其显著。重要的是，ERNIE 5.0被设计为视觉理解和生成的统一框架，其中视觉表示必须不仅支持判别性任务，还支持细粒度生成任务，如像素级图像和视频编辑。通过利用注意力，该模块自适应地将局部补丁与高层语义信息聚合在一起，捕获关键视觉特征，同时减少视觉词元的数量。这产生了一个紧凑而富有表现力的视觉表示，为各种视觉-语言任务提供了强大而稳定的基础。

items.en: Recall that the Next-Frame-and-Scale Prediction (NFSP) paradigm introduced in vision tokenization formulates visual generation in an autoregressive manner, where image generation is viewed as a special case of single-frame video generation. Under this formulation, the model predicts visual tokens across multiple spatial scales within each image (or each frame) for image generation, while performing frame-wise prediction along the temporal dimension for video generation. When predicting tokens at a certain scale, the model takes the previous generated scales as input, and a scale-wise causal attention mask is applied, where tokens within the current scale are bidirectionally visible and are predicted in parallel, while tokens from all previous scales and historical frames are visible in a causal (uni-directional) manner. The NFSP paradigm disentangles spatial and temporal modeling, that is, intra-frame prediction from low-resolution to high-resolution captures fine-grained spatial structures, whereas next-frame prediction models inter-frame temporal dependencies.
items.zh: 回顾一下，视觉词元化中引入的下一帧与尺度预测（NFSP）范式以自回归方式制定视觉生成，其中图像生成被视为单帧视频生成的特例。在此公式下，模型在图像生成中预测每个图像（或每个帧）内多个空间尺度的视觉词元，同时在视频生成中沿时间维度执行逐帧预测。在预测某个尺度的词元时，模型将先前生成的尺度作为输入，并应用尺度级因果注意力掩码，其中当前尺度内的词元双向可见并并行预测，而来自所有先前尺度和历史帧的词元以因果（单向）方式可见。NFSP范式解耦了空间和时间建模，即从低分辨率到高分辨率的帧内预测捕获细粒度空间结构，而下一帧预测建模帧间时间依赖性。

items.en: To support positional modeling of heterogeneous tokens across spatial and temporal dimensions, we introduce a Unified Spatiotemporal Rotary Positional Embedding (Uni-RoPE) and apply it to all tokens in ERNIE 5.0. For a unified sequence of length NN, the positional encoding of the ii-th token is defined as Uni\mathrm{Uni}-RoPEi=(ti,hi,wi),i∈{1,…,N}\mathrm{RoPE}_{i}=(t_{i},h_{i},w_{i}),i\in\{1,\ldots,N\}. For text and audio tokens, we set ti=hi=wit_{i}=h_{i}=w_{i}, where the shared value follows token index in the sequence. For visual tokens, tit_{i} is used for frame indexing, which increases monotonically to preserve temporal ordering, and (hi,wi)(h_{i},w_{i}) corresponds to spatial locations within each frame. To ensure spatial consistency across multi-scales, we adopt a center-aligned coordinate strategy, where tokens at different scales are aligned based on the geometric centers of the scale.
items.zh: 为了支持跨空间和时间维度的异质词元的位置建模，我们引入了统一的时空旋转位置嵌入（Uni-RoPE），并将其应用于ERNIE 5.0中的所有词元。对于长度为N的统一序列，第i个词元的位置编码定义为Uni-RoPEi=(ti,hi,wi),i∈{1,…,N}。对于文本和音频词元，我们设置ti=hi=wi，其中共享值遵循序列中的词元索引。对于视觉词元，ti用于帧索引，单调递增以保持时间顺序，(hi,wi)对应每个帧内的空间位置。为了确保跨多尺度的空间一致性，我们采用中心对齐坐标策略，其中不同尺度的词元基于尺度的几何中心对齐。

items.en: Empirically, auto-regressive visual generation is susceptible to error accumulation over extremely long token sequences. To mitigate this issue, we corrupt historical tokens during training by randomly flipping their bits, while supervising the model to self-correct toward the ground-truth tokens of the current scale. The corruption-based training strategy improves robustness against compounding errors in long-horizon generation. Meanwhile, we apply a loss reweighting strategy to emphasize early-stage predictions and alleviate the token imbalance introduced by multi-scale tokenization. For video generation in particular, we further introduce windowed temporal attention and random historical frame masking to encourage the model to focus on relevant temporal context and improve robustness (ji2026videoar).
items.zh: 经验上，自回归视觉生成在极长的词元序列上容易受到误差累积的影响。为了缓解这个问题，我们在训练期间通过随机翻转历史词元的比特来破坏它们，同时监督模型自我纠正到当前尺度的真实词元。基于破坏的训练策略提高了在长程生成中对复合误差的鲁棒性。同时，我们应用损失重加权策略来强调早期预测，并缓解多尺度词元化引入的词元不平衡。特别是对于视频生成，我们进一步引入了窗口化时间注意力和随机历史帧掩码，以鼓励模型关注相关的时间上下文并提高鲁棒性（ji2026videoar）。

items.en: Within the token-based modeling paradigm, training visual generation abilities under a fixed modality token budget poses a fundamental challenge for high-resolution images and videos. Increasing visual resolution enlarges the token sequence length, which in turn reduces the effective training batch size and degrades optimization stability. To address this challenge, we adopt a cascaded diffusion refiner on top of the autoregressive backbone. The backbone generates low-resolution samples with precise semantics and structural layout, while the refiner focuses on enhancing fine-grained visual details at higher resolution. The diffusion refiner is trained separately from the backbone, using paired low-resolution samples with controlled degradation, together with their corresponding high-resolution images or videos. The decoupled training scheme enables high-fidelity refinement while preserving the complete semantic and structure produced by the autoregressive model, and avoids optimization conflicts caused by introducing autoregressive and diffusion losses within a shared backbone.
items.zh: 在基于词元的建模范式下，在固定模态词元预算下训练视觉生成能力对高分辨率图像和视频构成了根本挑战。增加视觉分辨率会扩大词元序列长度，从而减少有效训练批次大小并降低优化稳定性。为了应对这一挑战，我们在自回归骨干网络之上采用级联扩散精炼器。骨干网络生成具有精确语义和结构布局的低分辨率样本，而精炼器专注于在更高分辨率下增强细粒度视觉细节。扩散精炼器与骨干网络分开训练，使用具有受控退化的配对低分辨率样本及其对应的高分辨率图像或视频。解耦的训练方案实现了高保真精炼，同时保留了自回归模型产生的完整语义和结构，并避免了在共享骨干网络中引入自回归和扩散损失导致的优化冲突。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Overview of the depth-wise architecture for audio understanding and generation. For understanding, embeddings from multiple residual levels are additively combined to form audio token representation. For generation, ERNIE 5.0 introduces Next-Codec Prediction (NCP) to achieve hierarchical prediction across transformer layers, where the ground-truth code embedding (or the predicted one during inference) is fed back to condition subsequent predictions.
items.capZh: 图3：用于音频理解和生成的深度级架构概览。对于理解，来自多个残差级别的嵌入被加性组合以形成音频词元表示。对于生成，ERNIE 5.0引入了下一编解码器预测（NCP），以在Transformer层之间实现分层预测，其中真实码嵌入（或推理时预测的嵌入）被反馈以条件后续预测。

items.en: Similar to the vision modality, audio modeling in ERNIE 5.0 is also formulated under a unified autoregressive, token-based framework that supports understanding and high-fidelity generation. Inspired by the success of neural audio codecs (kumar2023high; zhang2024speechtokenizer), audio signals are represented as hierarchical discrete codec tokens that capture higher-level semantics and fine-grained acoustic details. To avoid the prohibitive sequence length caused by flattening multi-codebook tokens into a single sequence, we introduce a depth-wise autoregressive architecture that performs structured prediction across codec dimensions, as illustrated in Figure 3.
items.zh: 与视觉模态类似，ERNIE 5.0中的音频建模也在统一的基于词元的自回归框架下制定，支持理解和高保真生成。受神经音频编解码器（kumar2023high; zhang2024speechtokenizer）成功的启发，音频信号被表示为分层离散编解码器词元，捕获高层语义和细粒度声学细节。为了避免将多码本词元展平为单个序列导致的过长序列长度，我们引入了一种深度级自回归架构，该架构在编解码器维度上执行结构化预测，如图3所示。

items.en: Given an input waveform, we first map the continuous audio signal into a sequence of discrete tokens using a codec-style tokenizer with a token rate of 12.5 Hz. The audio quantization module follows a Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) design, decomposing the signal into multiple tokens at different levels of granularity. In that case, the first token is explicitly assigned to encode high-level audio semantics, while the remaining tokens encode residual acoustic information with progressively finer details. To ensure that the first token captures rich semantic information, including linguistic and phonetic cues, required for audio–text modeling, we distill knowledge from a pretrained Whisper model (radford2023robust). Specifically, we align the representation of the first audio token with the encoder outputs of Whisper. Average pooling is applied to the Whisper representations to match the token rate of our audio tokenizer, which resolves the temporal mismatch between the teacher and student models. Complementary to the first semantic token, residual acoustic tokens preserve fine-grained characteristics of the audio signal, such as timbre and prosody. Together, the hierarchical tokenization process disentangles semantic content from acoustic realization and provides a compact audio representation that is integrated naturally into ERNIE 5.0 ’s unified autoregressive backbone.
items.zh: 给定输入波形，我们首先使用码率为12.5 Hz的编解码器风格词元化器将连续音频信号映射为离散词元序列。音频量化模块采用残差向量量化（RVQ）设计，将信号分解为不同粒度级别的多个词元。在这种情况下，第一个词元被明确分配用于编码高层音频语义，而其余词元以逐渐更精细的细节编码残差声学信息。为了确保第一个词元捕获丰富的语义信息（包括语言和语音线索），这对于音频-文本建模是必需的，我们从预训练的Whisper模型（radford2023robust）中蒸馏知识。具体来说，我们将第一个音频词元的表示与Whisper的编码器输出对齐。对Whisper表示应用平均池化以匹配我们的音频词元化器的码率，这解决了教师模型和学生模型之间的时间不匹配。与第一个语义词元互补，残差声学词元保留了音频信号的细粒度特征，如音色和韵律。总之，分层词元化过程将语义内容与声学实现解耦，并提供了一种紧凑的音频表示，自然地集成到ERNIE 5.0的统一自回归骨干网络中。

items.en: Based on the audio tokenization described above, we utilize a depth-wise autoregression architecture to model audio tokens for both understanding and generation, drawing inspiration from coarse-to-fine prediction paradigms developed in visual generation (chen2024spark). Instead of flattening all residual audio tokens into a single long sequence, ERNIE 5.0 distributes the prediction of residual codes across transformer layers. Each layer models audio information at a specific level of granularity, which allows multi-level audio representations to be efficiently handled within a unified framework.
items.zh: 基于上述音频词元化，我们利用深度级自回归架构来建模用于理解和生成的音频词元，借鉴了视觉生成中开发的从粗到细预测范式（chen2024spark）。ERNIE 5.0没有将所有残差音频词元展平为单个长序列，而是将残差码的预测分布到Transformer层中。每一层在特定的粒度级别上建模音频信息，这使得多级音频表示能够在统一框架内高效处理。

items.en: For audio understanding tasks, text tokens are embedded using standard text embedding layers, while audio tokens are represented through a depth-wise additive embedding mechanism. Each audio token consists of multiple discrete codes that correspond to different residual levels. At each level, the code is mapped to an embedding through a level-specific embedding matrices, and embeddings from all levels are summed to form the final codec representation. The additive aggregation reflects the residual nature of audio representation, where each depth contributes complementary information at different granularities from coarse to fine. The resulting audio token representations are placed at the corresponding positions in the input sequence and processed uniformly with text tokens by the autoregressive backbone, enabling seamless multimodal understanding.
items.zh: 对于音频理解任务，文本词元使用标准文本嵌入层嵌入，而音频词元通过深度级加性嵌入机制表示。每个音频词元由多个对应于不同残差级别的离散码组成。在每个级别，码通过特定级别的嵌入矩阵映射到嵌入，并且来自所有级别的嵌入被求和以形成最终的编解码器表示。加性聚合反映了音频表示的残差性质，其中每个深度从粗到细在不同粒度上贡献互补信息。得到的音频词元表示被放置在输入序列中的相应位置，并由自回归骨干网络与文本词元统一处理，从而实现无缝的多模态理解。

items.en: For audio generation tasks, ERNIE 5.0 introduces Next-Codec Prediction (NCP) to generate hierarchical audio tokens in a coarse-to-fine manner. Multiple audio heads are inserted into the top transformer layers to support depth-wise prediction. Conditioned on the multimodal context, the model first predicts the first semantic code and then sequentially generates codes for subsequent residual levels. After each prediction, the generated code is mapped to its corresponding embedding and added back to the hidden state, which then conditions the prediction at the next level. During training, teacher forcing is applied, and the feedback embedding is derived from the ground-truth code. Such iterative process continues until all levels are predicted, allowing high-level semantic information to guide the synthesis of increasingly fine-grained acoustic details. Once the complete set of hierarchical audio codes is obtained, the audio decoder converts them into waveforms. For speech synthesis, a speaker embedding is inserted as part of the conditioning context to enable controllable voice timbre, guiding acoustic realization without altering deep semantic content or depth-wise prediction structure. Overall, the NCP formulation is compatible with the residual design used during audio understanding, which ensures structural alignment between audio input and output.
items.zh: 对于音频生成任务，ERNIE 5.0引入了下一编解码器预测（NCP），以从粗到细的方式生成分层音频词元。多个音频头被插入到顶部Transformer层中以支持深度级预测。以多模态上下文为条件，模型首先预测第一个语义码，然后顺序生成后续残差级别的码。每次预测后，生成的码被映射到其对应的嵌入并加回到隐藏状态，然后该隐藏状态条件下一级别的预测。在训练期间，应用教师强制，反馈嵌入来自真实码。这种迭代过程持续到所有级别都被预测，允许高层语义信息指导越来越精细的声学细节的合成。一旦获得完整的分层音频码集，音频解码器将其转换为波形。对于语音合成，说话人嵌入作为条件上下文的一部分插入，以实现可控的语音音色，指导声学实现而不改变深层语义内容或深度级预测结构。总体而言，NCP公式与音频理解期间使用的残差设计兼容，这确保了音频输入和输出之间的结构对齐。

items.en: The pre-training phase forms the foundation of ERNIE 5.0, where the model learns generalizable representations across multiple modalities. In this section, we first describe the composition of pre-training data (Sec. 3.1), followed by a part of training recipe (Sec. 3.2). Finally, we focus on the Elastic Training technique (Sec. 3.3) introduced in ERNIE 5.0, which enables the production of multiple models of different sizes within a single pre-training run, significantly reducing the computational costs associated with training a series of models while maintaining both efficiency and performance.
items.zh: 预训练阶段构成了ERNIE 5.0的基础，在此阶段模型学习跨多种模态的通用表示。在本节中，我们首先描述预训练数据的组成（第3.1节），然后是部分训练方案（第3.2节）。最后，我们重点介绍ERNIE 5.0中引入的弹性训练技术（第3.3节），该技术能够在单个预训练运行中生成多个不同大小的模型，显著降低了训练一系列模型的计算成本，同时保持了效率和性能。

items.en: ERNIE 5.0 is trained on an large, high‑quality multimodal dataset that reflects its natively omni design and dual capabilities for both understanding and generation. Unlike conventional late-fusion approaches, ERNIE 5.0 is simultaneously exposed to text, images, videos, and audios from the very beginning of training. The unified training paradigm enables the model to learn representations that integrate semantic information across all modalities, while also requiring a large amount of pre-training data to support learning from scratch for each modality. To manage such diverse data, we build a standardized platform and organize all data according to their input and output modalities. Based on this organization, the pre-training data are broadly categorized into two groups: text data and multimodal data.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0在一个大规模、高质量的多模态数据集上训练，该数据集反映了其原生全能和理解与生成的双重能力。与传统的后期融合方法不同，ERNIE 5.0从训练开始就同时接触文本、图像、视频和音频。统一的训练范式使模型能够学习整合所有模态语义信息的表示，同时也需要大量的预训练数据来支持每种模态的从头学习。为了管理如此多样化的数据，我们构建了一个标准化平台，并根据输入和输出模态组织所有数据。基于这种组织，预训练数据大致分为两类：文本数据和多模态数据。

items.en: The textual component spans a vast collection of multilingual web crawls, curated corpora, books, scientific publications, code repositories, and structured knowledge sources selected for breadth, diversity, and linguistic richness. We retrain the text tokenizer to better support large-scale multilingual modeling. Specifically, we encode text in UTF-16BE to provide stable byte-level fallback and a more compact representation for many non-Latin symbols, improving data throughput in multilingual training, and we use BPE dropout (provilkov2020bpe) to reduce overfitting to frequent patterns. It is worth noting that, for languages without explicit whitespace word boundaries (e.g., Chinese), we filter out long unspaced phrases that can be decomposed by standard word-segmentation tools, which helps reduce vocabulary sparsity, improve training efficiency, and enhance model generalization.
items.zh: 文本组件涵盖了大量多语言网络爬虫、精选语料库、书籍、科学出版物、代码仓库和结构化知识源，这些数据经过选择以确保广度、多样性和语言丰富性。我们重新训练了文本词元化器，以更好地支持大规模多语言建模。具体来说，我们以UTF-16BE编码文本，以提供稳定的字节级回退和更紧凑的表示（适用于许多非拉丁符号），从而提高多语言训练中的数据吞吐量，并且我们使用BPE dropout（provilkov2020bpe）来减少对频繁模式的过拟合。值得注意的是，对于没有显式空格词边界的语言（例如中文），我们过滤掉可以通过标准分词工具分解的长无空格短语，这有助于减少词汇稀疏性，提高训练效率，并增强模型泛化能力。

items.en: For visual and audio modalities, we curate a dataset comprising paired image–text, video–text, audio-text, as well as diverse interleaved multimodal sequences where text is integrated with images, videos, and audio, all accompanied by metadata and captions. Such data composition connects textual concepts with visual and audio contexts across both spatial and temporal dimensions. By explicitly modeling cross-modal alignment, the model is able to learn semantic relationships not only within individual modalities and across disparate ones, which supports a wide range of tasks from multimodal understanding to creative multimodal generation.
items.zh: 对于视觉和音频模态，我们策划了一个数据集，包含配对的图像-文本、视频-文本、音频-文本，以及各种交错的多模态序列，其中文本与图像、视频和音频集成，所有这些都附有元数据和标题。这种数据组成将文本概念与视觉和音频上下文在空间和时间维度上连接起来。通过显式建模跨模态对齐，模型不仅能够学习单个模态内的语义关系，还能学习不同模态之间的语义关系，这支持从多模态理解到创造性多模态生成的广泛任务。

items.en: Rigorous preprocessing and quality controls are applied at scale to maintain both signal integrity and diversity. Heuristic and model-based filters remove low-quality and unsafe content, extensive deduplication prevents memorization artifacts, and decontamination safeguards keep benchmarks out of the training data. The finalized pre‑training corpus comprises trillions of text tokens and multimodal instances that balance scale with high‑fidelity semantic content. The large, diverse and well‑filtered dataset is fundamental to ERNIE 5.0's strong performance on text and multimodal understanding, reasoning, and generation benchmarks.
items.zh: 在大规模上应用了严格的预处理和质量控制，以保持信号完整性和多样性。基于启发式和模型的过滤器去除了低质量和有害内容，广泛的去重防止了记忆伪影，而去污染保障措施确保基准测试不在训练数据中。最终的预训练语料库包含数万亿的文本词元和多模态实例，在规模和高保真语义内容之间取得了平衡。这个大规模、多样且经过良好过滤的数据集是ERNIE 5.0在文本和多模态理解、推理和生成基准测试中表现出色的基础。

items.en: ERNIE 5.0 is trained with a carefully designed recipe to ensure training stability, scalability, and efficient utilization of compute resources. The training follows a multi-stage pre-training strategy to progressively extend context length while maintaining stable optimization dynamics.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0采用精心设计的训练方案进行训练，以确保训练稳定性、可扩展性和算力的高效利用。训练遵循多阶段预训练策略，以逐步扩展上下文长度，同时保持稳定的优化动态。

items.en: The initial stage uses a maximum context length of 8K tokens. We adopt a Warmup-Stable-Decay (WSD) learning rate schedule (hu2024minicpm) in this stage. The learning rate is linearly warmed up for 2,000 steps from zero to a peak value of 1×10−41\times 10^{-4}, and then kept constant for the remainder of the 8K training stage. To improve training efficiency and stability at scale, we employ a batch size scheduling strategy, where the global batch size is gradually increased from 14M tokens to 56M tokens during early training. To facilitate seamless long-context extension, the RoPE base is set to 1,000,000 starting from the 8K stage. This design choice avoids the need for reparameterization or interpolation during subsequent context length expansion, ensuring lossless and stable long-context training.
items.zh: 初始阶段使用最大上下文长度为8K词元。我们在此阶段采用Warmup-Stable-Decay（WSD）学习率调度（hu2024minicpm）。学习率从零开始线性预热2000步，达到峰值1×10−4，然后在8K训练阶段的剩余时间内保持恒定。为了提高大规模训练效率和稳定性，我们采用了批次大小调度策略，其中全局批次大小在早期训练期间从14M词元逐渐增加到56M词元。为了促进无缝的长上下文扩展，从8K阶段开始，RoPE基数设置为1,000,000。这一设计选择避免了在后续上下文长度扩展期间需要重新参数化或插值，确保了无损且稳定的长上下文训练。

items.en: In the mid-training stage, we progressively extend the context length to 32K and 128K tokens while keeping the global batch size unchanged. During this phase, we switch to a cosine learning rate schedule and anneal the learning rate from 1×10−41\times 10^{-4} to 1×10−51\times 10^{-5}.
items.zh: 在中期训练阶段，我们逐步将上下文长度扩展到32K和128K词元，同时保持全局批次大小不变。在此阶段，我们切换到余弦学习率调度，并将学习率从1×10−4退火到1×10−5。

items.en: For MoE-specific optimization, the bias update speed for auxiliary-loss-free load balancing (wang2024auxiliary) is set to 1×10−41\times 10^{-4} in the 8K pre-training stage and reduced to 1×10−51\times 10^{-5} during mid-training, which effectively suppresses iteration-level oscillations observed in large-scale MoE training. The MTP loss weight (deepseekv3) is decreased from 0.3 in the 8K stage to 0.1 during mid-training, ensuring stable adaptation as the model scales to longer contexts. Besides, we introduce a posterior-based loss weighting strategy that rescales the autoregressive losses of different modalities to the same interval, thereby improving training stability and preventing imbalance across modalities.
items.zh: 针对MoE特定优化，无辅助损失负载均衡（wang2024auxiliary）的偏置更新速度在8K预训练阶段设为1×10⁻⁴，并在中期训练中降至1×10⁻⁵，有效抑制了大规模MoE训练中观察到的迭代级振荡。MTP损失权重（deepseekv3）从8K阶段的0.3降至中期训练的0.1，确保模型在扩展到更长上下文时稳定适应。此外，我们引入了一种基于后验的损失加权策略，将不同模态的自回归损失重新缩放到相同区间，从而提升训练稳定性并防止模态间不平衡。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Overview of the elastic training framework in ERNIE 5.0. The framework supports elastic depth, width, and sparsity in a unified MoE architecture. Elastic Depth randomly adapts the number of active layers, Elastic Width varies the total number of experts in each MoE layer, and Elastic Sparsity changes the top-kk routing per token. These mechanisms collectively enable flexible deployment under different compute, memory, and latency constraints without retraining.
items.capZh: 图4：ERNIE 5.0弹性训练框架概览。该框架在统一的MoE架构中支持弹性深度、宽度和稀疏性。弹性深度随机调整活跃层数，弹性宽度改变每个MoE层中的专家总数，弹性稀疏性改变每个token的top-k路由。这些机制共同使得模型能够在不同算力、内存和延迟约束下灵活部署，无需重新训练。

items.en: The scaling of modern models presents a fundamental challenge. Although models with trillions of parameters achieve remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks, their high computational and deployment costs limit the applicability in scenarios that demand flexibility and efficiency.
items.zh: 现代模型的缩放（Scaling）带来了根本性挑战。尽管拥有数万亿参数的模型在广泛任务中取得了显著性能，但其高昂的计算和部署成本限制了在需要灵活性和效率的场景中的适用性。

items.en: Traditional approaches typically follow a ``train-then-compress'' pipeline, employing techniques such as pruning (sajjad2023effect; xia2023sheared; men2025shortgpt), knowledge distillation (gu2023minillm; xu2024survey) or more efficient fusion-based variants (wang2023learning; chen2024lemon; chen2024dha) to produce smaller models. However, this paradigm still suffers from notable limitations. Model compression requires a dedicated pruning or distillation stage, which demands specialized infrastructure and incurs substantial computational overhead. Moreover, once a model is compressed, its architecture becomes fixed. Consequently, creating models of other sizes necessitates repeating the full compression process, thereby constraining deployment flexibility.
items.zh: 传统方法通常遵循“先训练后压缩”的流程，采用剪枝（sajjad2023effect; xia2023sheared; men2025shortgpt）、知识蒸馏（gu2023minillm; xu2024survey）或更高效的融合变体（wang2023learning; chen2024lemon; chen2024dha）等技术来生成更小的模型。然而，这种范式仍存在显著局限性。模型压缩需要专门的剪枝或蒸馏阶段，这要求专用基础设施并带来大量计算开销。此外，一旦模型被压缩，其架构就固定了。因此，创建其他尺寸的模型需要重复完整的压缩过程，从而限制了部署灵活性。

items.en: To address these issues, we propose a novel elastic training strategy and apply it to ERNIE 5.0 for the first time. Rather than compressing a pre-trained model post hoc, elastic training simultaneously optimizes a family of sub-networks during pre-training, so that a single large model to efficiently produce smaller, deployable variants on demand. It extends the design philosophy of Once-For-All (devvrit2023matformer; cai2024flextron; gu2025elastic) to pre-training, in which sub-network configurations of varying depth, width, and sparsity are trained together with the full-scale model. As a result, ERNIE 5.0 can flexibly selects subsets of parameters to construct models at different scales, which reduces the computational and engineering overhead compared with traditional pruning or distillation methods.
items.zh: 为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的弹性训练策略，并首次应用于ERNIE 5.0。弹性训练并非事后压缩预训练模型，而是在预训练期间同时优化一系列子网络，使得单个大模型能够按需高效生成更小的可部署变体。它将Once-For-All（devvrit2023matformer; cai2024flextron; gu2025elastic）的设计理念扩展到预训练，其中不同深度、宽度和稀疏性的子网络配置与全尺寸模型一起训练。因此，ERNIE 5.0可以灵活选择参数子集来构建不同规模的模型，与传统剪枝或蒸馏方法相比，降低了计算和工程开销。

items.en: The elastic training is shown in Figure 4, which introduces structural flexibility along three orthogonal dimensions:
items.zh: 弹性训练如图4所示，它沿三个正交维度引入了结构灵活性：

items.en: To support elastic depth, ERNIE 5.0 randomly varies the number of active transformer layers during training, enabling the extraction of sub-networks with different depths. Most of the time, the full-depth network is used to ensure all layers are well-optimized, while shallower sub-networks are occasionally sampled to foster resilience against layer removal. Specifically, the full model is trained with a probability of 75%75\%, while a reduced-depth sub-network is activated with a probability of 25%25\%. Through this training scheme, intermediate representations are encouraged to remain informative even when some layers are bypassed, and the model supports flexible deployment across different depth configurations without requiring separate training.
items.zh: 为支持弹性深度，ERNIE 5.0在训练期间随机改变活跃Transformer层数，从而能够提取不同深度的子网络。大多数情况下使用全深度网络以确保所有层得到充分优化，同时偶尔采样较浅的子网络以增强对层移除的鲁棒性。具体而言，全模型以75%的概率训练，而减少深度的子网络以25%的概率激活。通过这种训练方案，即使某些层被跳过，中间表示也能保持信息量，并且模型支持在不同深度配置下灵活部署，无需单独训练。

items.en: Complementary to elastic depth, ERNIE 5.0 also supports elastic width by varying the total number of experts in each Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layer. Instead of always activating the full expert pool, the training process alternates between two modes. With a probability of 80%80\%, all experts participate in routing, preserving the full-width configuration. In the remaining 20%20\% of cases, routing is restricted to a randomly sampled subset of experts, leading to a narrower effective model width. By exposing the model to both full and reduced expert configurations, the resulting model supports different capacity budgets with only partial experts, making it suitable for deployment in memory-constrained environments where hosting all experts is impractical.
items.zh: 与弹性深度互补，ERNIE 5.0还通过改变每个混合专家（MoE）层中的专家总数来支持弹性宽度。训练过程在两种模式之间交替，而不是始终激活全部专家池。以80%的概率，所有专家参与路由，保持全宽度配置。在其余20%的情况下，路由被限制在随机采样的专家子集上，导致有效模型宽度变窄。通过让模型暴露于全专家和缩减专家配置，所得模型支持仅使用部分专家的不同容量预算，适用于托管所有专家不切实际的内存受限环境。

items.en: To improve inference efficiency without changing the deployed model size, elastic sparsity is introduced by varying the number of activated experts per token. Similar to the elasticity of total number of experts, the default routing configuration is applied with a probability of 80%80\% during training. With a probability of 20%20\%, the routing top-kk is randomly sampled from a predefined range, where kk is smaller than the standard configuration. In other words, the number of activated experts for each token is decreased. Finally, the model is compatible with different compute budgets and exhibits improved robustness during latency-constrained inference.
items.zh: 为在不改变部署模型大小的情况下提高推理效率，通过改变每个token激活的专家数量引入弹性稀疏性。与专家总数的弹性类似，训练期间默认路由配置以80%的概率应用。以20%的概率，路由top-k从预定义范围中随机采样，其中k小于标准配置。换句话说，每个token激活的专家数量减少。最终，模型兼容不同的计算预算，并在延迟受限推理期间表现出改进的鲁棒性。

items.en: By training an elastic super-network, ERNIE 5.0 is able to produce smaller models of varying configurations by selecting subsets of parameters along the layer number, total expert number, and activated expert number. Elasticity along the representation dimension (i.e., hidden size), as explored in recent work (chen2024mixture), is orthogonal to our design and can be naturally incorporated as a future extension. These sub-networks can be instantiated on demand to meet different latency and memory constraints, serving as effective starting points for mid-training or fine-tuning. Compared with training separate models from scratch or relying on post-hoc compression techniques, our elastic training strategy substantially lowers overall computational overhead and engineering complexity. Detailed experimental results and ablation studies are provided in Sec 6.4.2.
items.zh: 通过训练弹性超网络，ERNIE 5.0能够通过沿层数、专家总数和激活专家数选择参数子集来生成不同配置的较小模型。表示维度（即隐藏大小）的弹性，如近期工作（chen2024mixture）所探索的，与我们的设计正交，可以自然地作为未来扩展纳入。这些子网络可以按需实例化以满足不同的延迟和内存约束，作为中期训练或微调的有效起点。与从头训练单独模型或依赖事后压缩技术相比，我们的弹性训练策略显著降低了总体计算开销和工程复杂性。详细实验结果和消融研究见第6.4.2节。

items.en: After unified pre-training, we follow the same post-training pipeline as ERNIE 4.5 (ernie45tech) to obtain the final ERNIE 5.0, which includes two stages, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and unified multimodal reinforcement learning (UM-RL). With curating comprehensive set of high-quality instruction pairs, SFT endows the model with fundamental instruction-following capability and strengthens its ability to think through long chains-of-thought. During UM-RL phase, we merge the training of various tasks such as reasoning, agent, and instruction following into a multi-stage RL pipeline, enabling balanced performance across diverse tasks and modalities. We further extended the unified verifier system to generate accurate and consistent reward signals for model responses in a wide range of multimodal scenarios, providing reliable supervision for unified multimodal RL training. In this section, we will discuss the key challenges of RL training and describe the solutions we propose.
items.zh: 统一预训练后，我们遵循与ERNIE 4.5（ernie45tech）相同的后训练流程来获得最终的ERNIE 5.0，包括两个阶段：监督微调（SFT）和统一多模态强化学习（UM-RL）。通过策划全面的高质量指令对集合，SFT赋予模型基本的指令遵循能力，并增强其通过长思维链进行思考的能力。在UM-RL阶段，我们将推理、智能体和指令遵循等各种任务的训练合并到一个多阶段RL流程中，从而实现跨不同任务和模态的平衡性能。我们进一步扩展了统一验证器系统，以在广泛的多模态场景中为模型响应生成准确一致的奖励信号，为统一多模态RL训练提供可靠监督。在本节中，我们将讨论RL训练的关键挑战并描述我们提出的解决方案。

items.en: The RL training of ERNIE 5.0 faces several challenges. Firstly, RL training is computationally expensive, which is further amplified by the large scale of ERNIE 5.0. Secondly, the ultra-sparse MoE architecture exacerbates the training–inference discrepancy and undermines stability. Finally, compared to standalone RLVR tasks such as mathematical reasoning or code generation, training a model that simultaneously supports multiple scenarios and modalities introduces substantially higher complexity. To address these bottlenecks, we implement a suite of synergistic engineering and algorithmic optimizations that enable stable RL training for large-scale, ultra-sparse MoE models. In the sections that follow, we delineate the formidable challenges encountered in this endeavor and present our corresponding solutions.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0的RL训练面临若干挑战。首先，RL训练计算成本高昂，而ERNIE 5.0的大规模进一步放大了这一点。其次，超稀疏MoE架构加剧了训练-推理差异并破坏了稳定性。最后，与数学推理或代码生成等独立RLVR任务相比，训练同时支持多种场景和模态的模型引入了显著更高的复杂性。为解决这些瓶颈，我们实施了一套协同的工程和算法优化，使得大规模超稀疏MoE模型能够进行稳定的RL训练。在接下来的章节中，我们将描述在此过程中遇到的严峻挑战并提出相应的解决方案。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Visualization of the Unbiased Replay Buffer (U-RB) in ERNIE 5.0, in comparison with existing methods, where each query is assigned a unique index, and IB denotes the inference batch. In Sync RL, a long-tail query (e.g., index 11) blocks the entire batch, leaving GPUs idle and poorly utilized. APRIL stops generation once the target number of responses (16) is reached, which leads to a non-stationary data difficulty distribution. U-RB extends APRIL with a data-ordering constraint that prepares future batches while waiting for long-tail queries, preserving query order and mitigating inefficiency.
items.capZh: 图5：ERNIE 5.0中无偏重放缓冲区（U-RB）的可视化，与现有方法对比，其中每个查询被分配唯一索引，IB表示推理批次。在同步RL中，长尾查询（例如索引11）阻塞整个批次，导致GPU空闲且利用率低。APRIL在达到目标响应数（16）时停止生成，导致数据难度分布非平稳。U-RB通过数据排序约束扩展APRIL，在等待长尾查询时准备未来批次，保持查询顺序并缓解低效问题。

full.sec: 4.1 Enhancing Rollout Efficiency with Unbiased Replay Buffer
full.secZh: 4.1 利用无偏重放缓冲区提升推理效率

items.en: Rollout generation accounts for more than 90% of the total training time in RL, and efficiency is often limited by the long-tail distribution of rollout response lengths. In that case, a small number of unusually long responses stall entire batches, leaving GPUs idle and underutilized. Recent work, such as APRIL (zhou2025april), seeks to mitigate long-tail inefficiency by over-provisioning rollout requests. Generation is terminated once a target number of responses is collected, and incomplete responses are recycled for continuation in subsequent steps. However, APRIL tends to update model parameters using trajectories with shorter reasoning steps, which usually correspond to easier queries. In contrast, longer-horizon samples are deferred, leading to a non-stationary distribution of data difficulty. Consequently, periodic shifts in data difficulty may hinder convergence and ultimately degrade model performance.
items.zh: Rollout生成占RL总训练时间的90%以上，效率常受限于rollout响应长度的长尾分布。在这种情况下，少量异常长的响应会阻塞整个批次，导致GPU空闲且利用率不足。近期工作如APRIL（zhou2025april）试图通过过度供应rollout请求来缓解长尾低效。一旦收集到目标数量的响应，生成即终止，不完整的响应被回收用于后续步骤的继续。然而，APRIL倾向于使用推理步骤较短的轨迹更新模型参数，这些通常对应较简单的查询。相反，长程样本被延迟，导致数据难度分布非平稳。因此，数据难度的周期性变化可能阻碍收敛并最终降低模型性能。

items.en: We introduce U-RB, an unbiased extension of APRIL that accelerates rollout generation in RL. As illustrated in Figure 5, U-RB introduces a data-ordering constraint, under which only the data group assigned to the current iteration at initialization is allowed to participate in subsequent training process. Specifically, U-RB builds two modules. The first is a high-throughput inference pool, 𝒫i​n​f​e​r\mathcal{P}_{infer}, with capacity ΩR​B​S=ΩB​S∗N\Omega_{RBS}=\Omega_{BS}*N, where ΩB​S\Omega_{BS} is the training batch size and NN is the buffer size, The second component is a training pool 𝒫t​r​a​i​n\mathcal{P}_{train} with capacity ΩB​S\Omega_{BS}, which collects completed trajectories for RL training. At iteration tt, the inference engine πi​n​f​e​r;θt\pi_{{infer};\theta_{t}} populates the inference pool by generating rollouts in parallel. Inference proceeds until the terminal state (i.e., [E​O​S][EOS]) is reached for the longest rollout belonging to the data group 𝒟t\mathcal{D}_{t} assigned to iteration tt. At this point, rollouts associated with 𝒟t\mathcal{D}_{t} are moved from 𝒫i​n​f​e​r\mathcal{P}_{infer} to the training pool 𝒫t​r​a​i​n\mathcal{P}_{train}, enabling the training engine πt​r​a​i​n;θt\pi_{train;\theta_{t}} to update model parameters. These rollouts may include trajectories resumed from earlier inference runs. By dynamically partitioning rollout generation, U-RB prevents computational idleness caused by individual long rollouts, while maintaining an unbiased data distribution.
items.zh: 我们引入U-RB，一种APRIL的无偏扩展，用于加速RL中的rollout生成。如图5所示，U-RB引入了一个数据排序约束，只有初始化时分配给当前迭代的数据组才允许参与后续训练过程。具体而言，U-RB构建了两个模块。第一个是高吞吐量推理池P_infer，容量为Ω_RBS = Ω_BS * N，其中Ω_BS是训练批次大小，N是缓冲区大小。第二个组件是训练池P_train，容量为Ω_BS，用于收集完成的轨迹进行RL训练。在迭代t时，推理引擎π_infer;θ_t通过并行生成rollout来填充推理池。推理持续进行，直到属于分配给迭代t的数据组D_t的最长rollout达到终止状态（即[EOS]）。此时，与D_t相关的rollout从P_infer移动到训练池P_train，使训练引擎π_train;θ_t能够更新模型参数。这些rollout可能包括从先前推理运行中恢复的轨迹。通过动态划分rollout生成，U-RB防止了由单个长rollout引起的计算空闲，同时保持了无偏的数据分布。

full.sec: 4.2 Stabilizing Training with Mitigated Entropy Collapse
full.secZh: 4.2 缓解熵坍缩以稳定训练

items.en: The phenomenon of rapid entropy collapse in a multimodal model is manifested as a sharp increase or decrease in policy entropy during the early stages of RL. In multimodal decision-making tasks that integrate text, vision and audio information, such collapse gradually erodes the model’s ability to fuse information across modalities for flexible reasoning and reveals a pronounced modality bias.
items.zh: 多模态模型中熵快速崩溃的现象表现为RL早期策略熵的急剧增加或减少。在融合文本、视觉和音频信息的多模态决策任务中，这种崩溃逐渐侵蚀模型跨模态融合信息进行灵活推理的能力，并暴露出明显的模态偏差。

items.en: Recent studies (cui2025entropy; wang2025beyond) attribute entropy collapse mainly to two factors. First, most contemporary RL frameworks rely on separate engines for training and inference, which introduces inconsistencies in numerical computation, and ultimately destabilizes policy optimization. The problem becomes more severe for MoE models, where dynamic routing further amplifies the numerical mismatch problem. Second, the policy model often overfits easy queries in the early stage of training. Such behavior accelerates entropy collapse and limits the model’s ability to discover alternative reasoning paths. To address these issues, we introduce Multi-granularity Importance Sampling Clipping (MISC) and Well-learned Positive Sample Mask (WPSM) to stabilize RL training at scale.
items.zh: 近期研究（cui2025entropy; wang2025beyond）将熵崩溃主要归因于两个因素。首先，大多数当代RL框架依赖独立的训练和推理引擎，这引入了数值计算的不一致性，最终破坏了策略优化的稳定性。对于MoE模型，动态路由进一步放大了数值不匹配问题，问题更为严重。其次，策略模型在训练早期往往过拟合简单查询。这种行为加速了熵崩溃，并限制了模型发现替代推理路径的能力。为解决这些问题，我们引入了多粒度重要性采样裁剪（MISC）和良好学习正样本掩码（WPSM），以稳定大规模RL训练。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Training dynamics of applying 𝔍I​c​e​P​o​pM​i​x​e​d\mathfrak{J}_{IcePop}^{Mixed} (dark-blue) and 𝔍I​c​e​P​o​pG​S​P​O\mathfrak{J}_{IcePop}^{GSPO} (light-blue) to conduct RL training on ERNIE 5.0. By using Multi-granularity Importance Sampling Clipping (MISC), we avoid the entropy collapse during early stage and achieve stable RL training.
items.capZh: 图6：在ERNIE 5.0上应用J_IcePop^Mixed（深蓝）和J_IcePop^GSPO（浅蓝）进行RL训练的训练动态。通过使用多粒度重要性采样裁剪（MISC），我们避免了早期阶段的熵崩溃，实现了稳定的RL训练。

The phenomenon is caused by sequence-level truncated importance sampling, which prunes a large number of low-entropy responses due to the training–inference mismatch.
items.zh: 然而，我们的实验表明，直接将 𝔍I​c​e​P​o​pG​S​P​O 应用于 ERNIE 5.0 的强化学习训练会导致熵迅速崩溃，如图 6 中浅蓝色线所示。该现象是由序列级截断重要性采样引起的，由于训练-推理不匹配，该方法会剪除大量低熵响应。

items.zh: 为解决此问题，我们将 𝔍I​c​e​P​o​pG​S​P​O 修改为 𝔍I​c​e​P​o​pM​i​x​e​d：

items.en: By modulating the trust region according to the modality sensitivity, we achieve a more balanced exploration–exploitation trade-off. The mechanism avoids premature convergence to a ``safe'' yet suboptimal strategy in complex multi-scenario settings, and preserves flexibility across various inputs.
items.zh: 通过根据模态敏感性调节信任区域，我们实现了更平衡的探索-利用权衡。该机制避免了在复杂多场景设置中过早收敛到“安全”但次优的策略，并在各种输入上保持了灵活性。

items.en: We introduce a sample mask strategy to prevent the model from over-optimizing on already mastered queries, in which the proficiency is tracked by maintaining a success-rate for each query. For a given query xx with a rollout group 𝒴x={y1x,y2x,…,yGx}\mathcal{Y}^{x}=\{y^{x}_{1},y^{x}_{2},...,y^{x}_{G}\}, where GG is the group size, if the average accuracy a​c​ctxacc^{x}_{t} in iteration tt exceeds a threshold τ\tau, we flag the rollout yixy^{x}_{i} in 𝒴x\mathcal{Y}^{x} as a ``well-learned'' response when its policy entropy ℋyix​(πθ)\mathcal{H}_{y^{x}_{i}}(\pi_{\theta}) falls below a stability bound η\eta. During training, the ``well-learned'' responses are masked as follows:
items.zh: 我们引入了一种样本掩码策略，以防止模型对已掌握的查询过度优化，其中通过维护每个查询的成功率来跟踪熟练度。对于给定查询 xx 及其 rollout 组 𝒴x={y1x,y2x,…,yGx}，其中 G 是组大小，如果在迭代 t 中的平均准确率 acctx 超过阈值 τ，则当策略熵 ℋyix(πθ) 低于稳定性界限 η 时，我们将 𝒴x 中的 rollout yix 标记为“已学好”响应。在训练期间，“已学好”响应按如下方式被掩码：

items.en: where si​(θ)s_{i}(\theta) denotes the importance ratio and α∈[0,1]\alpha\in[0,1] controls the degree of supplementary learning applied to ``well-learned'' responses. Under this design, the gradient budget is shifted toward harder samples, such as those with sparse rewards or diverse reasoning paths. By masking redundant positive signals, WPSM alleviates the entropy collapse problem caused by over-fitting to easy queries, and encourages the model to improve the performances of challenging, low-performing tasks.
items.zh: 其中 si(θ) 表示重要性比率，α∈[0,1] 控制应用于“已学好”响应的补充学习程度。在此设计下，梯度预算转向更难的样本，例如具有稀疏奖励或多样化推理路径的样本。通过掩码冗余的正信号，WPSM 缓解了由对简单查询过拟合引起的熵崩溃问题，并鼓励模型改进具有挑战性的低性能任务的表现。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Overview of the Adaptive Hint-based Reinforcement Learning (AHRL) in ERNIE 5.0, which introduces think skeletons to guide hard queries and mitigate sparse rewards.
items.capZh: 图 7：ERNIE 5.0 中自适应提示强化学习（AHRL）的概述，它引入思考骨架来指导困难查询并缓解稀疏奖励问题。

full.sec: 4.3 Boosting Sample Efficiency with Hint-based Learning
full.secZh: 4.3 基于提示学习提升样本效率

items.en: Recent studies (yue2025does; liu2025prorl; zhao2025echo) indicate that although state-of-the-art RL methods, such as GRPO (deepseekr1) and DAPO (yu2025dapo), enhance the pass@1 metric by reinforcing high-reward completions, they exhibit clear limitations on challenging tasks where the base model performs poorly. Specifically, when all rollouts receive zero reward, the GRPO framework fails to provide effective gradient signals for policy optimization. In such cases, RL training on hard queries tends to progress much more slowly because sparse rewards and limited sample efficiency impede learning. To address this challenge, we propose Adaptive Hint-based Reinforcement Learning (AHRL), a method that mitigates the issues of sparse rewords on hard queries. As can be seen in Figure 7, AHRL introduces partial hints that decompose the complex problem into intermediate steps and gradually increase the performance of trained models. The mechanism is described in detail below.
items.zh: 最近的研究（yue2025does; liu2025prorl; zhao2025echo）表明，尽管最先进的强化学习方法（如 GRPO 和 DAPO）通过强化高奖励完成来提升 pass@1 指标，但在基础模型表现不佳的困难任务上存在明显局限性。具体来说，当所有 rollout 获得零奖励时，GRPO 框架无法为策略优化提供有效的梯度信号。在这种情况下，由于稀疏奖励和有限的样本效率阻碍学习，困难查询上的强化学习训练往往进展缓慢。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了自适应提示强化学习（AHRL），一种缓解困难查询上稀疏奖励问题的方法。如图 7 所示，AHRL 引入部分提示，将复杂问题分解为中间步骤，并逐步提升训练模型的表现。该机制详细描述如下。

items.en: Unlike approaches that modify reward functions or optimization algorithms, AHRL is designed to inject partial think sketches into queries during RL training. By decomposing problems into intermediate steps, AHRL increases the propensity of the base model to generate correct responses and improves sample efficiency. As a result, the model is driven to master the hardest problems, which accelerates the RL training process.
items.zh: 与修改奖励函数或优化算法的方法不同，AHRL 旨在强化学习训练期间向查询注入部分思考骨架。通过将问题分解为中间步骤，AHRL 增加了基础模型生成正确响应的倾向，并提高了样本效率。因此，模型被驱动去掌握最困难的问题，从而加速强化学习训练过程。

items.en: For a given query xx with a response consisting of a thinking trajectory and a final solution, denoted as y=(t​h​i​n​k,s​o​l​u​t​i​o​n)y=(think,solution), AHRL augments xx into x~(p)\tilde{x}^{(p)} by attaching the first ph​i​n​tp_{hint} tokens of the think to the original query. ph​i​n​tp_{hint} denotes the fraction of revealed thinking, allowing fine-grained control over query difficulty. Specifically, The probability ph​i​n​tp_{hint} follows an annealing schedule:
