items.en: where tt is the training iteration, γ\gamma is the decay rate, and p​a​s​si​n​i​t​i​a​lxpass_{initial}^{x} is the pass@k score of query xx evaluated on the SFT model. As training progresses and model performance improves, the fraction of revealed hints is gradually reduced, transitioning the model to full self-exploration. The mechanism provides necessary ``scaffolding'' to bridge the gap between initial exploration and successful task completion. It prevents training from stalling in complex tasks where valid reasoning paths are statistically rare, and ensures consistent performance improvements across modalities.
items.zh: 其中 t 是训练迭代次数，γ 是衰减率，passinitialx 是查询 xx 在 SFT 模型上评估的 pass@k 分数。随着训练进行和模型性能提升，揭示的提示比例逐渐减少，使模型过渡到完全自我探索。该机制提供了必要的“脚手架”，以弥合初始探索与成功完成任务之间的差距。它防止训练在有效推理路径统计上罕见的复杂任务中停滞，并确保跨模态的性能持续提升。

items.en: The training of ERNIE 5.0 is built upon PaddlePaddle (paddlepaddle). Based on the infrastructure of ERNIE 4.5 (ernie45tech), we further address the unique challenges introduced by native multimodal training, ultra-sparse MoE models, and large-scale RL pipelines.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0 的训练基于 PaddlePaddle 构建。在 ERNIE 4.5 的基础设施之上，我们进一步解决了原生多模态训练、超稀疏 MoE 模型和大规模强化学习流水线带来的独特挑战。

items.en: The ultra-sparse MoE architecture of ERNIE 5.0 poses two major challenges for efficient training: ultra-sparse expert activation leads to heavy inter-node communication, and large-scale expert parameters impose significant memory pressure. To mitigate these challenges, we propose a hybrid parallel strategy tailored for the MoE architecture, integrated with fine-grained memory control.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0 的超稀疏 MoE 架构对高效训练提出了两大挑战：超稀疏专家激活导致大量节点间通信，以及大规模专家参数带来显著的内存压力。为缓解这些挑战，我们提出了一种针对 MoE 架构的混合并行策略，并结合了细粒度内存控制。

items.en: As a unified model supporting text, vision, and audio, ERNIE 5.0 relies on multiple modality-specific tokenizer models. Their computational characteristics differ significantly from those of the MoE backbone, making it challenging to apply traditional end-to-end optimization strategy across all parts. To resolve this mismatch, we adopt a decoupled architecture that physically separates tokenizers from the MoE backbone and deploys them on different GPU nodes, allowing each component to use its most suitable parallelization strategy.
items.zh: 作为支持文本、视觉和音频的统一模型，ERNIE 5.0 依赖于多个模态特定的分词器模型。它们的计算特性与 MoE 骨干网络差异显著，使得难以在所有部分应用传统的端到端优化策略。为解决此不匹配问题，我们采用了解耦架构，将分词器与 MoE 骨干网络物理分离，并部署在不同的 GPU 节点上，允许每个组件使用其最合适的并行化策略。

items.en: ERNIE 5.0 processes inputs from multiple modalities with heterogeneous attention patterns. Visual inputs typically require bidirectional attention, whereas text and audio inputs rely on unidirectional attention. Although existing solutions such as FlexAttention (dong2024flex) support flexible attention, they are less efficient when attention mask patterns vary across samples within the same batch. We therefore adopt the self-developed FlashMask (flashmask) to accelerate attention mask computation here.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0 处理来自多种模态的输入，具有异构的注意力模式。视觉输入通常需要双向注意力，而文本和音频输入依赖于单向注意力。尽管现有解决方案（如 FlexAttention）支持灵活注意力，但当同一批次内样本的注意力掩码模式变化时，它们效率较低。因此，我们在此采用自研的 FlashMask 来加速注意力掩码计算。

items.en: Reinforcement learning for a trillion-parameter model requires coordinated execution across training, inference, and environment interaction. Such heterogeneous workloads pose challenges in maintaining numerical consistency between training and rollout, mitigating data distribution bias in asynchronous pipelines, and maximizing the utilization of diverse hardware resources. We therefore design a scalable and disaggregated RL infrastructure to resolve these bottlenecks while preserving strict computational determinism.
items.zh: 针对万亿参数模型的强化学习需要在训练、推理和环境交互之间协调执行。这种异构工作负载在保持训练和 rollout 之间的数值一致性、缓解异步流水线中的数据分布偏差以及最大化多样化硬件资源的利用率方面带来了挑战。因此，我们设计了一个可扩展且分离的强化学习基础设施，以解决这些瓶颈，同时保持严格的计算确定性。

full.sec: 5.1 Hybrid Parallelism for Training at Scale
full.secZh: 5.1 大规模训练的混合并行

items.en: To address the severe memory pressure and communication overhead introduced by the ultra-sparse MoE architecture, we develop a distributed parallel strategy that adapts to varying training resources. The final configuration combines 4-way tensor parallelism (megatronlm), 12-way pipeline parallelism (gpipe) with virtual stages, 64-way expert parallelism (gshard), ZeRO-1 data parallelism (zero), and context parallelism (ringattention) for long context training. We also use DeepEP (deepep) to enable efficient inter-node communication, while virtual pipeline parallelism is employed to minimize pipeline bubbles. To ensure final performance, ERNIE 5.0 utilize a no-token-dropping strategy throughout training, and out-of-memory (OOM) issues sometimes occur due to unbalanced expert routing, especially in the initial stage of training. To mitigate these issues and stabilize large-scale MoE training, we develop a set of techniques as follows.
items.zh: 为解决超稀疏 MoE 架构带来的严重内存压力和通信开销，我们开发了一种适应不同训练资源的分布式并行策略。最终配置结合了 4 路张量并行、带虚拟阶段的 12 路流水线并行、64 路专家并行、ZeRO-1 数据并行以及用于长上下文训练的上下文并行。我们还使用 DeepEP 实现高效的节点间通信，同时采用虚拟流水线并行以最小化流水线气泡。为确保最终性能，ERNIE 5.0 在整个训练过程中采用无 token 丢弃策略，由于专家路由不平衡，有时会出现内存不足（OOM）问题，尤其是在训练初始阶段。为缓解这些问题并稳定大规模 MoE 训练，我们开发了如下一系列技术。

items.en: To ensure memory sufficiency, we implement the following strategies:
items.zh: 为确保内存充足，我们实施了以下策略：

items.en: FP8 Mixed-Precision Training. Following the practice of ERNIE 4.5 (ernie45tech), we adopt FP8 mixed-precision training and store activation tensors in FP8 format, which effectively reduces peak memory consumption during training.
items.zh: FP8 混合精度训练。遵循 ERNIE 4.5 的做法，我们采用 FP8 混合精度训练，并将激活张量以 FP8 格式存储，这有效降低了训练期间的峰值内存消耗。

items.en: Dynamic Adaptive Offloading of Activation Memory. During forward propagation, all activation tensors retained for backward computation are tracked. We extend the memory allocator to enable adaptive offloading of selected activation tensors when an OOM event is encountered. No offloading is triggered when sufficient memory is available. This technology ensures sufficient total memory for training with minimal performance overhead.
items.zh: 激活内存的动态自适应卸载。在前向传播过程中，跟踪所有为反向计算保留的激活张量。我们扩展了内存分配器，以便在遇到 OOM 事件时能够自适应地卸载选定的激活张量。当内存充足时不触发卸载。该技术确保了训练所需的总内存充足，且性能开销最小。

items.en: To reduce memory fragmentation, we implement the following strategies:
items.zh: 为减少内存碎片，我们实施了以下策略：

items.en: Sub-batch Computations. We decompose large memory allocation requests into a series of smaller requests with sub-batch computation, which reduces the probability of OOM caused by memory fragmentation.
items.zh: 子批次计算。我们将大的内存分配请求分解为一系列带有子批次计算的较小请求，从而降低由内存碎片引起的OOM概率。

items.en: Automatic Memory Defragmentation. Based on CUDA virtual memory management (VMM), we develop a memory allocation allocator capable of automatic memory defragmentation, ensuring successful memory allocation even under extreme conditions.
items.zh: 自动内存碎片整理。基于CUDA虚拟内存管理（VMM），我们开发了一种能够自动进行内存碎片整理的内存分配器，确保即使在极端条件下也能成功分配内存。

items.en: Through the aforementioned techniques, we ensure the feasibility and reliability of pre-training ERNIE 5.0 in memory-constrained scenarios.
items.zh: 通过上述技术，我们确保了在内存受限场景下预训练ERNIE 5.0的可行性和可靠性。

full.secZh: 5.2 多模态训练的分离架构

items.en: ERNIE 5.0 integrates heterogeneous multimodal inputs, where each modality is handled by a dedicated tokenizer that converts raw signals into token sequences. Both sequence lengths and computational costs vary substantially across modalities and even among samples within the same modality. Deploying all tokenizers together with backbone on homogeneous hardware would induce significant load imbalance, which in turn degrades overall training efficiency.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0集成了异构多模态输入，每种模态由专门的tokenizer处理，将原始信号转换为token序列。序列长度和计算成本在不同模态之间甚至同一模态内的样本之间差异很大。将所有tokenizer与backbone部署在同构硬件上会导致严重的负载不均衡，进而降低整体训练效率。

items.en: To solve this problem, we design a tokenizer-backbone disaggregation architecture. We decouple the tokenizers from the backbone by deploying them as independent, horizontally scalable services on dedicated compute nodes, under a data-parallel configuration. During training, the backbone interacts with these tokenizer services via remote calls to retrieve encoded representations. The architectural separation allows each component to adopt parallelization strategies suited to its own workload, improving scalability and efficiency in distributed multimodal training.
items.zh: 为解决此问题，我们设计了一种tokenizer-backbone分离架构。我们将tokenizer与backbone解耦，将它们作为独立的、可水平扩展的服务部署在专用计算节点上，采用数据并行配置。训练期间，backbone通过远程调用与这些tokenizer服务交互以获取编码表示。架构分离允许每个组件采用适合其自身工作负载的并行化策略，从而提高了分布式多模态训练的可扩展性和效率。

items.en: In ERNIE 5.0, attention patterns vary across modalities and may even differ across samples. Text modeling typically relies on causal attention, while visual features often employ bidirectional attention. That is, for visual samples, attention follows a globally causal structure while allowing local bidirectional interactions to capture spatial dependencies. Efficiently supporting such heterogeneous masking patterns is therefore essential for unified multimodal training.
items.zh: 在ERNIE 5.0中，注意力模式因模态而异，甚至可能因样本而异。文本建模通常依赖因果注意力，而视觉特征通常采用双向注意力。也就是说，对于视觉样本，注意力遵循全局因果结构，同时允许局部双向交互以捕获空间依赖关系。因此，高效支持这种异构掩码模式对于统一多模态训练至关重要。

items.en: To meet these requirements, we employ FlashMask (flashmask), which not only meets the flexible and diverse attention masking needs of ERNIE 5.0, but also significantly accelerates the computational efficiency of attention mask operations. In practice, FlashMask achieves up to a 200% speedup over FlexAttention (dong2024flex) at the operator-level, and delivers more than 20% end-to-end training acceleration. In addition, we integrate FlashMask with context parallelism (ringattention) at the kernel level, achieving an 80% performance improvement compared to the Megatron-LM solution.
items.zh: 为满足这些需求，我们采用FlashMask，它不仅满足了ERNIE 5.0灵活多样的注意力掩码需求，还显著加速了注意力掩码操作的计算效率。在实践中，FlashMask在算子级别比FlexAttention（dong2024flex）实现了高达200%的加速，并提供了超过20%的端到端训练加速。此外，我们在内核级别将FlashMask与上下文并行（ringattention）集成，与Megatron-LM解决方案相比实现了80%的性能提升。

full.secZh: 5.4 可扩展且分离的强化学习基础设施

items.en: Scaling Reinforcement Learning (RL) to unified multimodal models with trillions of parameters presents unique challenges regarding computational consistency, data distribution bias, and heterogeneous resource utilization. To address these bottlenecks, we introduce the ERNIE 5.0 RL Infrastructure, a disaggregated system designed to orchestrate large-scale asynchronous training. By prioritizing high-throughput execution and computation determinism, our system ensures stable and efficient RL training.
items.zh: 将强化学习扩展到具有数万亿参数的统一多模态模型，在计算一致性、数据分布偏差和异构资源利用方面带来了独特挑战。为解决这些瓶颈，我们引入了ERNIE 5.0 RL基础设施，这是一个用于编排大规模异步训练的分离式系统。通过优先考虑高吞吐量执行和计算确定性，我们的系统确保了稳定高效的RL训练。

items.en: The key architectural components are summarized as follows:
items.zh: 关键架构组件总结如下：

items.en: Disaggregated Control Plane for Asynchronous RL. We introduce a fully disaggregated control plane built around a centralized RL controller to maximize system throughput, which coordinates training, inference, environment interaction, and reward evaluation in an asynchronous manner. Logical decoupling across these subsystems enables flexible scaling and efficient pipeline management, forming the foundation for large-scale asynchronous multimodal RL.
items.zh: 用于异步RL的分离式控制平面。我们引入了一个完全分离的控制平面，围绕一个集中式RL控制器构建，以最大化系统吞吐量，该控制器以异步方式协调训练、推理、环境交互和奖励评估。这些子系统之间的逻辑解耦实现了灵活的扩展和高效的流水线管理，为大规模异步多模态RL奠定了基础。

items.en: Unified FP8 Stack for Consistent Training and Inference. Precision divergence is a common issue in low-bit RL training. To alleviate this situation, we build a unified FP8 execution engine. By employing identical high-performance operators across both training and inference (rollout) stages and integrating the Rollout Router Replay (ma2025stabilizing) strategy, the engine minimizes numerical mismatch and ensures stable convergence under low-precision settings.
items.zh: 用于一致训练和推理的统一FP8栈。精度差异是低比特RL训练中的常见问题。为缓解这种情况，我们构建了一个统一的FP8执行引擎。通过在训练和推理（rollout）阶段使用相同的高性能算子，并集成Rollout Router Replay（ma2025stabilizing）策略，该引擎最小化了数值不匹配，并确保了低精度设置下的稳定收敛。

items.en: Replay Buffer for Sequence-Length Bias Mitigation. Asynchronous rollout in RL may introduce sequence-length bias, where shorter responses enter training earlier and distort the data distribution. We design an unbiased replay buffer, in collaboration with the algorithm described in Section 4.1, that preserves the original data order, ensuring consistent data arrival and mitigating bias caused by asynchronous completion.
items.zh: 用于缓解序列长度偏差的回放缓冲区。RL中的异步rollout可能引入序列长度偏差，其中较短的响应更早进入训练并扭曲数据分布。我们设计了一个无偏回放缓冲区，与第4.1节中描述的算法协作，保留原始数据顺序，确保一致的数据到达并减轻由异步完成引起的偏差。

items.en: Heterogeneous Resource Optimization with Elastic CPU Pooling. To address the under utilization of CPU resources commonly observed in GPU-dominated AI clusters, we implement an elastic CPU pooling strategy. The elastic mechanism isolates and virtualizes idle CPU capacity from the cluster to power logic-intensive tasks such as intensive RL environment interactions and result verification. It effectively amplifies the computational resources available for environment rollouts, enabling massive-scale parallel simulation. Consequently, it reduces the wall-clock time of training iterations while significantly improving the total cost of ownership (TCO) efficiency of the underlying hardware.
items.zh: 具有弹性CPU池的异构资源优化。为解决GPU主导的AI集群中常见的CPU资源利用不足问题，我们实施了一种弹性CPU池策略。弹性机制从集群中隔离并虚拟化空闲CPU容量，以支持逻辑密集型任务，如密集的RL环境交互和结果验证。它有效放大了用于环境rollout的计算资源，实现了大规模并行模拟。因此，它减少了训练迭代的挂钟时间，同时显著提高了底层硬件的总拥有成本（TCO）效率。

items.en: We conduct systematic evaluations of ERNIE 5.0 against state-of-the-art models across a wide range of text (Sec. 6.1), vision (Sec. 6.2), and audio benchmarks (Sec. 6.3) with internal evaluation framework, ERNIE-Eval111For code-related tasks, evaluations are conducted with LiveCodeBench (livecodebench) and SandboxFusion (sandboxfusion) to ensure reliable and execution-based assessment.. Next, we further provide an in-depth analysis of our two key design choices, namely modality-agnostic expert routing (Sec. 6.4.1) and elastic training (Sec. 6.4.2).
items.zh: 我们使用内部评估框架ERNIE-Eval，在广泛的文本（第6.1节）、视觉（第6.2节）和音频基准（第6.3节）上，对ERNIE 5.0与最先进模型进行了系统评估。接下来，我们进一步深入分析了两个关键设计选择，即模态无关的专家路由（第6.4.1节）和弹性训练（第6.4.2节）。

items.en: To comprehensively assess the text-centric capabilities learned during large-scale pre-training and post-training, we evaluate ERNIE 5.0 on a diverse set of benchmarks covering factual knowledge, reasoning, mathematical problem solving, coding, multilingual understanding, instruction following and agent-oriented tasks. These benchmarks are selected to encompass both core language modeling abilities and advanced reasoning and decision-making skills. This enables a systematic examination of how the unified architecture and training strategies translate into downstream text performance.
items.zh: 为全面评估大规模预训练和后训练中学到的以文本为中心的能力，我们在涵盖事实知识、推理、数学问题求解、编码、多语言理解、指令遵循和智能体导向任务的多样化基准上评估了ERNIE 5.0。这些基准被选择以涵盖核心语言建模能力以及高级推理和决策技能。这使得能够系统检查统一架构和训练策略如何转化为下游文本性能。

items.en: Knowledge: PreciseWikiQA (precisewikiqa), PopQA (popqa), HotPotQA (yang2018hotpotqa), ChineseSimpleQA (chinese-simpleqa), SimpleQA (simpleqa).
items.zh: 知识：PreciseWikiQA、PopQA、HotPotQA、ChineseSimpleQA、SimpleQA。

items.en: General: MMLU-Pro (mmlu-pro), MMCU (mmcu), AGIEval (agieval), MMLU (mmlu), MMLU-Redux (mmlu-redux), C-Eval (ceval), CMMLU (cmmlu), BBH (bbh), WinoGrande (winogrande), Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) (hle).
items.zh: 通用：MMLU-Pro、MMCU、AGIEval、MMLU、MMLU-Redux、C-Eval、CMMLU、BBH、WinoGrande、Humanity's Last Exam (HLE)。

items.en: STEM: MATH (CoT) (math), GPQA-Diamond (gpqa), AIME 2025 (aime), HMMT 2025 (hmmt2025).
items.zh: STEM：MATH (CoT)、GPQA-Diamond、AIME 2025、HMMT 2025。

items.en: Coding: LiveCodeBench v6 (2408 to 2505) (livecodebench), HumanEval+ (humaneval), MBPP+ (mbpp), CRUXEval (gu2024cruxeval).
items.zh: 编码：LiveCodeBench v6 (2408 to 2505)、HumanEval+、MBPP+、CRUXEval。

items.en: Multilingual: MMMLU (mmlu), INCLUDE (romanou2024include).
items.zh: 多语言：MMMLU、INCLUDE。

items.en: Reasoning: ZebraLogic (zebralogic), BBEH (bbeh).
items.zh: 推理：ZebraLogic (zebralogic)、BBEH (bbeh)。

items.en: Instruct Following: IFEval (ifeval), Multichallenge (multichallenge), Multi-IF (multiif).
items.zh: 指令遵循：IFEval (ifeval)、Multichallenge (multichallenge)、Multi-IF (multiif)。

items.en: Agent: TAU2-Bench (tau2bench), ACEBench (chen2025acebench), BFCL v4 (patil2025bfcl), BrowseComp (wei2025browsecomp), SpreadSheetBench (ma2024spreadsheetbench).
items.zh: 智能体：TAU2-Bench (tau2bench)、ACEBench (chen2025acebench)、BFCL v4 (patil2025bfcl)、BrowseComp (wei2025browsecomp)、SpreadSheetBench (ma2024spreadsheetbench)。

items.en: On knowledge-intensive benchmarks, ERNIE 5.0-Base demonstrates clear and substantial advantages over DeepSeek V3.2-Exp-Base (DS V3.2-Exp-Base) and Kimi K2-Base, particularly on both English and Chinese question answering tasks. The large margins observed on these datasets indicate that large-scale unified pre-training effectively consolidates factual knowledge and supports robust retrieval-style reasoning in multilingual settings.
items.zh: 在知识密集型基准测试上，ERNIE 5.0-Base 相比 DeepSeek V3.2-Exp-Base (DS V3.2-Exp-Base) 和 Kimi K2-Base 展现出明显且显著的优势，尤其是在英文和中文问答任务上。在这些数据集上观察到的大幅差距表明，大规模统一预训练有效整合了事实知识，并支持多语言环境下的稳健检索式推理。

items.en: On general reasoning and exam-style benchmarks, ERNIE 5.0-Base achieves the best results on a wide range of challenging evaluations, including MMLU-Pro, MMLU, MMCU, AGIEval, MMLU-Redux, and BBH. Notably, the pronounced gains on harder benchmarks such as MMLU-Pro suggest improved reasoning depth and robustness, which can be attributed to the shared backbone and modality-agnostic MoE routing that encourage effective expert specialization.
items.zh: 在通用推理和考试类基准测试上，ERNIE 5.0-Base 在包括 MMLU-Pro、MMLU、MMCU、AGIEval、MMLU-Redux 和 BBH 在内的广泛具有挑战性的评估中取得了最佳结果。值得注意的是，在 MMLU-Pro 等更难基准上的显著提升表明推理深度和稳健性有所提高，这归因于共享主干和模态无关的 MoE 路由，促进了有效的专家专业化。

items.en: On STEM tasks, ERNIE 5.0-Base consistently outperforms strong baselines on MATH (CoT) and GPQA-Diamond, demonstrating robust multi-step reasoning and solution consistency. These improvements reflect enhanced long-horizon dependency modeling enabled by the deep unified architecture, together with stable optimization under elastic pre-training.
items.zh: 在 STEM 任务上，ERNIE 5.0-Base 在 MATH (CoT) 和 GPQA-Diamond 上持续优于强基线，展示了稳健的多步推理和解决方案一致性。这些改进反映了深度统一架构所实现的增强的长程依赖建模，以及在弹性预训练下的稳定优化。

items.en: In the coding domain, ERNIE 5.0-Base attains state-of-the-art performance on LiveCodeBench v6 and CRUXEval, while remaining competitive on MBPP+, indicating strong generalization of algorithmic and procedural reasoning learned during large-scale pre-training.
items.zh: 在编程领域，ERNIE 5.0-Base 在 LiveCodeBench v6 和 CRUXEval 上达到了最先进的性能，同时在 MBPP+ 上保持竞争力，表明在大规模预训练中学到的算法和程序推理具有很强的泛化能力。

items.en: On multilingual benchmarks, ERNIE 5.0-Base significantly surpasses baselines on MMMLU and INCLUDE, validating the effectiveness of unified tokenization and shared expert routing in learning robust multilingual representations.
items.zh: 在多语言基准测试上，ERNIE 5.0-Base 在 MMMLU 和 INCLUDE 上显著超越基线，验证了统一分词和共享专家路由在学习稳健多语言表示方面的有效性。

items.en: The results demonstrate that the proposed unified architecture and elastic pre-training strategy jointly yield strong generalization across diverse text-centric tasks, providing a solid and versatile foundation for subsequent post-training and deployment.
items.zh: 结果表明，所提出的统一架构和弹性预训练策略共同在多样化的以文本为中心的任务上产生了强大的泛化能力，为后续的后训练和部署提供了坚实且通用的基础。

items.en: As shown in Table 2, the post-trained ERNIE 5.0 achieves competitive or leading performance across a broad set of text-centric benchmarks, matching strong open-source and proprietary models on knowledge, instruction-following, coding, and agent-oriented tasks, while maintaining strong general reasoning ability, despite being a natively unified omni model:
items.zh: 如表 2 所示，后训练的 ERNIE 5.0 在广泛的以文本为中心的基准测试上取得了有竞争力或领先的性能，在知识、指令遵循、编程和智能体导向任务上与强大的开源和专有模型相匹配，同时保持了强大的通用推理能力，尽管它是一个原生统一的全能模型：

items.en: On knowledge-intensive benchmarks, such as SimpleQA and ChineseSimpleQA, ERNIE 5.0 further improves upon the already strong pre-training results. This indicates that post-training effectively enhances factual recall and answer calibration, while preserving the underlying knowledge representations learned during large-scale pre-training.
items.zh: 在知识密集型基准测试上，例如 SimpleQA 和 ChineseSimpleQA，ERNIE 5.0 在已经强大的预训练结果基础上进一步改进。这表明后训练有效增强了事实回忆和答案校准，同时保留了在大规模预训练中学到的底层知识表示。

items.en: On general reasoning, mathematical, and coding benchmarks, ERNIE 5.0 demonstrates stable and competitive performance against strong post-trained baselines. Although Gemini 3-Pro achieves leading results on several particularly challenging benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, AIME 2025, HMMT 2025, and LiveCodeBench, ERNIE 5.0 consistently matches or outperforms DeepSeek-V3.2-Thinking (DS-V3.2-Thinking), Gemini 2.5-Pro, and GPT-5 (High) on most of the benchmarks. This behavior aligns well with the pre-training observations, suggesting that ERNIE 5.0 emphasizes robust and balanced capability development rather than aggressive optimization toward extreme reasoning or competition-style tasks.
items.zh: 在通用推理、数学和编程基准测试上，ERNIE 5.0 表现出稳定且有竞争力的性能，与强大的后训练基线相当。尽管 Gemini 3-Pro 在几个特别具有挑战性的基准上取得了领先结果，包括 GPQA-Diamond、AIME 2025、HMMT 2025 和 LiveCodeBench，但 ERNIE 5.0 在大多数基准上始终匹配或超越 DeepSeek-V3.2-Thinking (DS-V3.2-Thinking)、Gemini 2.5-Pro 和 GPT-5 (High)。这种行为与预训练观察结果高度一致，表明 ERNIE 5.0 强调稳健且均衡的能力发展，而不是针对极端推理或竞赛式任务进行激进优化。

items.en: On instruction-following benchmarks, ERNIE 5.0 shows clear advantages on multi-instruction evaluations, achieving the best performance on MultiChallenge and Multi-IF, as well as near-top results on IFEval. These results suggest that post-training effectively strengthens instruction compliance and compositional instruction understanding, complementing the strong pre-trained foundation.
items.zh: 在指令遵循基准测试上，ERNIE 5.0 在多指令评估中显示出明显优势，在 MultiChallenge 和 Multi-IF 上取得了最佳性能，在 IFEval 上也接近最高结果。这些结果表明后训练有效增强了指令遵从性和组合指令理解，补充了强大的预训练基础。

items.en: On agent-oriented benchmarks, ERNIE 5.0 demonstrates competitive and often leading performance, particularly on ACEBench (in both English and Chinese) and BrowseComp-zh. While Gemini 3-Pro excels on certain tool-intensive tasks, ERNIE 5.0 exhibits strong generalization across diverse agent scenarios, indicating practical usability in complex interactive environments.
items.zh: 在智能体导向基准测试上，ERNIE 5.0 表现出有竞争力且往往是领先的性能，尤其是在 ACEBench（英文和中文）和 BrowseComp-zh 上。虽然 Gemini 3-Pro 在某些工具密集型任务上表现出色，但 ERNIE 5.0 在多样化的智能体场景中展现出强大的泛化能力，表明在复杂交互环境中具有实际可用性。

items.en: The comparison between pre-training and post-training results highlights a consistent capability trajectory of ERNIE 5.0. Strengths in factual knowledge and general robustness established during pre-training are almost retained after post-training, while instruction following and agent capabilities are significantly enhanced. Although ERNIE 5.0 remains competitive across general reasoning, math, and coding tasks, a moderate gap persists on the most challenging reasoning benchmarks compared to models such as Gemini 3-Pro. Our future wok will further leverage architectural design and advanced training strategies to better support complex, long-horizon reasoning.
items.zh: 预训练和后训练结果之间的比较凸显了 ERNIE 5.0 一致的能力轨迹。预训练期间建立的事实知识和通用稳健性方面的优势在后训练后几乎得以保留，而指令遵循和智能体能力则显著增强。尽管 ERNIE 5.0 在通用推理、数学和编程任务上仍具有竞争力，但与 Gemini 3-Pro 等模型相比，在最具挑战性的推理基准上仍存在中等差距。我们未来的工作将进一步利用架构设计和先进的训练策略，以更好地支持复杂的、长程推理。

items.en: To evaluate the visual understanding and generation capabilities enabled by native multimodal training, we assess ERNIE 5.0 on various image-centric and video-centric benchmarks. These evaluations cover visual reasoning, document understanding, visual question answering, video understanding, as well as image and video generation, providing a holistic assessment of how the unified multi-modal architecture manifests as performances across perception, reasoning, and generation tasks.
items.zh: 为了评估原生多模态训练所实现的视觉理解和生成能力，我们在各种以图像和视频为中心的基准上评估 ERNIE 5.0。这些评估涵盖视觉推理、文档理解、视觉问答、视频理解以及图像和视频生成，提供了对统一多模态架构如何在感知、推理和生成任务上体现性能的整体评估。

items.en: STEM and Reasoning: MMMU-Pro (mmmupro), MathVista (mathvista), MathVerse (zhang2024mathverse), MathVision (mathvision), VisualPuzzle (visualpuzzles), VisuLogic (xu2025visulogic), VLMAreBlind (vlmareblind), MMMU (mmmu).
items.zh: STEM 与推理：MMMU-Pro (mmmupro)、MathVista (mathvista)、MathVerse (zhang2024mathverse)、MathVision (mathvision)、VisualPuzzle (visualpuzzles)、VisuLogic (xu2025visulogic)、VLMAreBlind (vlmareblind)、MMMU (mmmu)。

items.en: Document Understanding: ChartQA (chartqa), AI2D (ai2d), DocVQA(val) (docvqa), OCRBench (ocrbench), ChartXiv-RQ, ChartXiv-DQ (wang2024charxiv).
items.zh: 文档理解：ChartQA (chartqa)、AI2D (ai2d)、DocVQA(val) (docvqa)、OCRBench (ocrbench)、ChartXiv-RQ、ChartXiv-DQ (wang2024charxiv)。

items.en: General VQA: SimpleVQA (simplevqa), HallusionBench (guan2024hallusionbench), MMStar (mmstar), BLINK (fu2024blink), CV-Bench (zhu2025cvbench), CountBench (countbench).
items.zh: 通用 VQA：SimpleVQA (simplevqa)、HallusionBench (guan2024hallusionbench)、MMStar (mmstar)、BLINK (fu2024blink)、CV-Bench (zhu2025cvbench)、CountBench (countbench)。

items.en: Video Understanding: VideoMME (videomme), Video-MMMU (videommmu), MMVU (zhao2025mmvu).
items.zh: 视频理解：VideoMME (videomme)、Video-MMMU (videommmu)、MMVU (zhao2025mmvu)。

items.en: Image and Video Generation: GenEval (ghosh2023geneval), VBench (huang2024vbench).
items.zh: 图像与视频生成：GenEval (ghosh2023geneval)、VBench (huang2024vbench)。

items.en: ERNIE 5.0-Base exhibits strong and well-rounded performances across visual reasoning, document understanding, and general VQA benchmarks, despite the absence of instruction tuning. It suggests that core multimodal perception and cross-modal reasoning abilities are largely acquired during pre-training, benefiting from early fusion of visual and textual tokens and modality-agnostic representation learning. This behavior differs from modular or late-fusion designs, where comparable capabilities typically emerge only after extensive task-specific tuning. Based on this foundation, ERNIE 5.0 consistently improves performance on most benchmarks, particularly on tasks requiring explicit reasoning, compositional understanding, and robust visual–language alignment.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0-Base 在视觉推理、文档理解和通用 VQA 基准测试中展现出强大且全面的性能，尽管没有进行指令微调。这表明核心的多模态感知和跨模态推理能力主要是在预训练阶段获得的，得益于视觉和文本 token 的早期融合以及模态无关的表示学习。这种行为不同于模块化或后期融合设计，在后者中，类似的能力通常只有在经过大量任务特定微调后才能出现。基于这一基础，ERNIE 5.0 在大多数基准测试上持续提升性能，尤其是在需要显式推理、组合理解和稳健视觉-语言对齐的任务上。

items.en: Compared with other strong multimodal baselines, ERNIE 5.0 achieves competitive or superior results on a wide range of reasoning, document understanding, and general VQA tasks, while maintaining balanced performance rather than optimizing for individual benchmarks. It indicates that instruction tuning in ERNIE 5.0 primarily refines reasoning and alignment behaviors, instead of compensating for perceptual capacity.
items.zh: 与其他强大的多模态基线模型相比，ERNIE 5.0 在广泛的推理、文档理解和通用 VQA 任务上取得了具有竞争力或更优的结果，同时保持了平衡的性能，而不是针对单个基准进行优化。这表明 ERNIE 5.0 中的指令微调主要优化了推理和对齐行为，而不是弥补感知能力。

items.en: In document understanding scenarios, the relatively strong results of ERNIE 5.0-Base already demonstrate effective layout-aware reasoning and text extraction, while ERNIE 5.0 further enhances question understanding and structured reasoning over complex visual documents. A similar trend is observed in general VQA and video understanding benchmarks, where instruction tuning improves robustness and temporal reasoning without altering the underlying architecture.
items.zh: 在文档理解场景中，ERNIE 5.0-Base 相对较强的结果已经展示了有效的布局感知推理和文本提取，而 ERNIE 5.0 进一步增强了问题理解和对复杂视觉文档的结构化推理。在通用 VQA 和视频理解基准测试中也观察到了类似的趋势，指令微调在不改变底层架构的情况下提高了鲁棒性和时间推理能力。

items.en: We evaluate ERNIE 5.0 on widely used benchmarks for both image and video generation, and compare it with leading commercial and open-source models.
items.zh: 我们在广泛使用的图像和视频生成基准测试上评估了 ERNIE 5.0，并将其与领先的商业和开源模型进行了比较。

items.en: For image generation, as shown in Table 5, ERNIE 5.0 achieves competitive performance on the GenEval benchmark. In particular, ERNIE 5.0 performs on par with state-of-the-art commercial systems such as Nano-Banana Pro (gemini3.0) and Qwen-Image (qwen-image), and is comparable to GPT-Image (gpt4o) and Seedream 4.0 (seedream4). It demonstrates that ERNIE 5.0 is capable of producing high-aesthetic images with strong semantic alignment and fine-grained visual details.
items.zh: 对于图像生成，如表 5 所示，ERNIE 5.0 在 GenEval 基准测试上取得了具有竞争力的性能。特别是，ERNIE 5.0 的表现与最先进的商业系统（如 Nano-Banana Pro (gemini3.0) 和 Qwen-Image (qwen-image)）相当，并且与 GPT-Image (gpt4o) 和 Seedream 4.0 (seedream4) 不相上下。这表明 ERNIE 5.0 能够生成具有高美学质量、强语义对齐和细粒度视觉细节的图像。

items.en: For video generation, Table 6 summarizes the results on the VBench benchmark. ERNIE 5.0 achieves the best performance on VBench-Semantic, surpassing strong commercial models such as Veo3 (veo3), which indicates its superior semantic alignment in video generation. This advantage aligns with the unified multimodal architecture, where high-level semantic representations are effectively transferred to generative tasks. Meanwhile, ERNIE 5.0 remains competitive on the overall and quality metrics, demonstrating solid visual fidelity and temporal consistency. In addition, ERNIE 5.0 performs on par with leading open-source models such as HunyuanVideo-1 (hunyuanvideo) and Wan2.1-14B-0725 (wan), indicating that the proposed architecture provides a strong video generation foundation even before post-training. Overall, these results validate the effectiveness of ERNIE 5.0 in producing semantically accurate and visually coherent videos.
items.zh: 对于视频生成，表 6 总结了 VBench 基准测试的结果。ERNIE 5.0 在 VBench-Semantic 上取得了最佳性能，超过了 Veo3 (veo3) 等强大的商业模型，这表明其在视频生成中具有优越的语义对齐能力。这一优势与统一的多模态架构一致，其中高级语义表示被有效地转移到生成任务中。同时，ERNIE 5.0 在整体和质量指标上仍具有竞争力，展示了坚实的视觉保真度和时间一致性。此外，ERNIE 5.0 的表现与领先的开源模型（如 HunyuanVideo-1 (hunyuanvideo) 和 Wan2.1-14B-0725 (wan)）相当，表明所提出的架构即使在后训练之前也提供了强大的视频生成基础。总体而言，这些结果验证了 ERNIE 5.0 在生成语义准确且视觉连贯的视频方面的有效性。

items.en: To evaluate the audio understanding and generation capabilities enabled by native multimodal training, we assess ERNIE 5.0 on a diverse suite of speech- and audio-centric benchmarks. These evaluations cover automatic speech recognition, speech-based dialogue, general audio understanding, as well as speech generation, providing a comprehensive view of how the unified multimodal architecture translates into robust audio perception, semantic understanding, and generation performance across across diverse linguistic and acoustic environments.
items.zh: 为了评估原生多模态训练带来的音频理解和生成能力，我们在多样化的语音和音频基准测试套件上评估了 ERNIE 5.0。这些评估涵盖了自动语音识别、语音对话、通用音频理解以及语音生成，全面展示了统一的多模态架构如何转化为跨不同语言和声学环境的稳健音频感知、语义理解和生成性能。

items.en: Automatic Speech Recognition: AISHELL-1 (bu2017aishell), AISHELL-2 (du2018aishell), WenetSpeech (zhang2022wenetspeech), LibriSpeech (panayotov2015librispeech), Fleurs (conneau2023fleurs).
items.zh: 自动语音识别：AISHELL-1 (bu2017aishell)、AISHELL-2 (du2018aishell)、WenetSpeech (zhang2022wenetspeech)、LibriSpeech (panayotov2015librispeech)、Fleurs (conneau2023fleurs)。

items.en: Voice Chatting: VoiceBench (chen2024voicebench).
items.zh: 语音聊天：VoiceBench (chen2024voicebench)。

items.en: Audio Understanding: MMAU (sakshi2024mmau), CochlScene (jeong2022cochlscene), TUT2017 (mesaros2016tut), ClothoAQA (lipping2022clotho), VocalSound (gong2022vocalsound).
items.zh: 音频理解：MMAU (sakshi2024mmau)、CochlScene (jeong2022cochlscene)、TUT2017 (mesaros2016tut)、ClothoAQA (lipping2022clotho)、VocalSound (gong2022vocalsound)。

items.en: We compare ERNIE 5.0 with other leading specialist and generalist models on ASR, voice-chatting, and other audio understanding benchmarks. As shown in Table 7 and Table 8, ERNIE 5.0 exihibits state-of-the-art or competitive performance across speech recognition, speech-to-text dialogue, audio understanding and speech generation benchmarks.
items.zh: 我们将 ERNIE 5.0 与其他领先的专用和通用模型在 ASR、语音聊天和其他音频理解基准测试上进行了比较。如表 7 和表 8 所示，ERNIE 5.0 在语音识别、语音到文本对话、音频理解和语音生成基准测试中表现出最先进或具有竞争力的性能。

items.en: On automatic speech recognition (ASR) tasks, ERNIE 5.0 achieves low word error rate (WER) on both Chinese and English benchmarks, including AISHELL and LibriSpeech, indicating robust performance across languages and acoustic conditions. While some models achieve stronger results on specific datasets such as WenetSpeech, ERNIE 5.0 maintains consistently stable performance across a wide range of ASR benchmarks, reflecting good generalization.
items.zh: 在自动语音识别（ASR）任务上，ERNIE 5.0 在中文和英文基准测试（包括 AISHELL 和 LibriSpeech）上均实现了较低的词错误率（WER），表明其在多种语言和声学条件下具有稳健的性能。虽然某些模型在特定数据集（如 WenetSpeech）上取得了更强的结果，但 ERNIE 5.0 在广泛的 ASR 基准测试中保持了一致的稳定性能，反映了良好的泛化能力。

items.en: On VoiceBench, ERNIE 5.0 remains competitive on tasks such as MMSU and OpenBookQA, reflecting its ability to handle speech-based interaction and knowledge-grounded reasoning.
items.zh: 在 VoiceBench 上，ERNIE 5.0 在 MMSU 和 OpenBookQA 等任务上保持竞争力，反映了其处理基于语音的交互和基于知识的推理的能力。

items.en: For audio understanding tasks, ERNIE 5.0 performs favorably on acoustic scene and environmental sound benchmarks such as TUT2017 and CochlScene, while achieving comparable results on more diverse benchmarks including MMAU and ClothoAQA. Overall, the model shows consistent performance across a wide range of non-speech and general audio understanding tasks, indicating its ability to capture audio semantics beyond speech content.
items.zh: 对于音频理解任务，ERNIE 5.0 在声学场景和环境声音基准测试（如 TUT2017 和 CochlScene）上表现良好，同时在更多样化的基准测试（包括 MMAU 和 ClothoAQA）上取得了可比的结果。总体而言，该模型在广泛的非语音和通用音频理解任务上表现出一致的性能，表明其能够捕获语音内容之外的音频语义。

items.en: On SEED-TTS, ERNIE 5.0 achieves competitive content consistency on both Chinese and English test sets (test-zh, test-en), performing comparably to recent audio–language models such as Qwen3-Omni. While specialist TTS systems (e.g., CosyVoice-3) obtain stronger results, ERNIE 5.0 demonstrates reliable content preservation without task-specific TTS optimization.
items.zh: 在 SEED-TTS 上，ERNIE 5.0 在中文和英文测试集（test-zh、test-en）上取得了具有竞争力的内容一致性，与最近的音频-语言模型（如 Qwen3-Omni）表现相当。虽然专门的 TTS 系统（例如 CosyVoice-3）获得了更强的结果，但 ERNIE 5.0 在没有任务特定 TTS 优化的情况下展示了可靠的内容保留。

items.en: Taken together, the results in Table 7 indicate that ERNIE-5.0 is a competitive unified audio–language model that balances speech recognition accuracy, speech interaction, general audio understanding and speech generation within a single framework.
items.zh: 综合来看，表 7 的结果表明 ERNIE-5.0 是一个具有竞争力的统一音频-语言模型，在单一框架内平衡了语音识别准确性、语音交互、通用音频理解和语音生成。

items.en: To better understand the behavior of ERNIE 5.0 in large-scale multimodal training, we dissect two pivotal architectural designs: modality-agnostic expert routing and elastic training. The following subsections analyze these two components and their effects on efficiency and scalability.
items.zh: 为了更好地理解 ERNIE 5.0 在大规模多模态训练中的行为，我们剖析了两个关键的架构设计：模态无关的专家路由和弹性训练。以下小节分析这两个组件及其对效率和可扩展性的影响。

items.en: ERNIE 5.0 employs a modality-agnostic expert routing mechanism, without introducing modality-specific parameters or routing rules. All inputs, including text, image, video, and audio, are processed by the same routing network and share a common pool of experts. In this discussion, we examine the expert routing behavior of the MoE model, with particular attention to modality-specific utilization patterns, cross-modality expert overlap, and routing balance across layers.
items.zh: ERNIE 5.0 采用模态无关的专家路由机制，不引入模态特定的参数或路由规则。所有输入，包括文本、图像、视频和音频，都由相同的路由网络处理，并共享一个共同的专家池。在此讨论中，我们检查 MoE 模型的专家路由行为，特别关注模态特定的利用模式、跨模态专家重叠以及各层的路由平衡。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Visualization of the load balancing across layers and modalities, using the normalized entropy (NE) metric of expert routing.
items.capZh: 图10：使用专家路由的归一化熵（NE）指标，跨层和跨模态的负载均衡可视化。

items.en: From a layer-wise perspective, the text modality exhibits consistently high and stable normalized entropy across almost all layers, with only a mild drop observed at the final layer. Notably, the first layer does not show severe imbalance, contradicting the common assumption that early MoE layers require dense designs to maintain routing stability (deepseekv3).
items.zh: 从逐层角度来看，文本模态在几乎所有层都表现出持续高且稳定的归一化熵，仅在最后一层略有下降。值得注意的是，第一层并未表现出严重的不平衡，这与早期MoE层需要密集设计以维持路由稳定性的常见假设相矛盾（deepseekv3）。

items.en: For visual understanding, expert utilization becomes less balanced at both the lowest and highest layers, while the middle layers maintain relatively uniform routing, suggesting that visual perception benefits from balanced expert sharing during intermediate feature abstraction stages. In contrast, visual generation and audio-related tasks display a different trend: the first layer shows a moderate level of balance, followed by a decrease in entropy in lower layers, a partial recovery in lower-to-mid layers, and a fluctuating drop at the higher layers. This pattern indicates alternating phases of expert specialization and re-integration along depth for generative and audio-centric tasks.
items.zh: 对于视觉理解，专家利用率在最低层和最高层变得不太均衡，而中间层保持相对均匀的路由，这表明视觉感知在中间特征抽象阶段受益于均衡的专家共享。相比之下，视觉生成和音频相关任务呈现出不同的趋势：第一层表现出中等程度的均衡，随后在较低层熵下降，在较低到中间层部分恢复，并在较高层波动下降。这种模式表明，对于生成和音频中心任务，沿深度方向交替出现专家专业化和重新整合的阶段。

items.en: Taken together, these analyses reveal clear expert utilization patterns across layers, modalities, and tasks in ERNIE 5.0. Although the routing mechanism is modality-agnostic during training, pronounced expert specialization across modalities still emerges, which suggests that the router could capture modality structure and allocate expert capacity in a self-driven manner. From a system perspective, the unified routing mechanism simplifies the overall design and avoids manual expert partitioning across modalities. Beyond empirical observations, the routing behaviors and load-balancing characteristics also offer practical guidance for future model design. For example, layer-aware expert allocation, adaptive balancing strategies, and modality-shared expert configurations may have the potential to become effective principles for building the next generation of native multimodal architectures.
items.zh: 综合来看，这些分析揭示了ERNIE 5.0中跨层、跨模态和跨任务的清晰专家利用模式。尽管路由机制在训练过程中与模态无关，但跨模态的显著专家专业化仍然出现，这表明路由器能够以自驱动方式捕获模态结构并分配专家容量。从系统角度来看，统一的路由机制简化了整体设计，并避免了跨模态的手动专家划分。除了经验观察之外，路由行为和负载均衡特性也为未来模型设计提供了实用指导。例如，分层感知的专家分配、自适应均衡策略和模态共享的专家配置可能成为构建下一代原生多模态架构的有效原则。

items.en: Elastic training plays a central role in enabling ERNIE 5.0 to adapt to different compute, memory, and latency constraints. In this section, we analyze elastic training strategies through controlled ablation studies on a small-scale MoE model and report key findings on ERNIE 5.0. Unless otherwise specified, all elastic configurations are derived from the same pretrained checkpoint.
items.zh: 弹性训练在使ERNIE 5.0适应不同算力、内存和延迟约束方面发挥着核心作用。在本节中，我们通过在小规模MoE模型上进行受控消融研究来分析弹性训练策略，并报告ERNIE 5.0的关键发现。除非另有说明，所有弹性配置均来自相同的预训练检查点。

items.en: We conduct ablation studies using a small-scale MoE model with 64 experts, 454M activated parameters, and 3.2B total parameters. The model is trained on 250B tokens with a default routing configuration of top-k=8k=8. Validation loss on held-out data is reported throughout. Based on this experimental setup, we analyze elasticity along the three dimensions separately.
items.zh: 我们使用一个小规模MoE模型进行消融研究，该模型具有64个专家、4.54亿激活参数和32亿总参数。该模型在2500亿个token上训练，默认路由配置为top-k=8。全程报告在保留数据上的验证损失。基于此实验设置，我们分别沿三个维度分析弹性。

items.en: Elastic Depth. We first study elastic depth by varying the number of active transformer layers during training. Consistent with the configuration of ERNIE 5.0, 80% of training samples retain the full-depth model, while the remaining 20% reduced-depth sub-networks. As reported in Table 9, elastic depth slightly improves full-depth performance, which indicates a regularization effect introduced by occasional layer dropping. Moreover, reduced-depth sub-networks exhibit smooth and predictable performance degradation, suggesting that intermediate representations remain robust under layer removal. Overall, elastic depth offers a low-risk and cost-efficient mechanism for deriving multiple deployable sub-models from a single pretrained checkpoint.
items.zh: 弹性深度。我们首先通过改变训练期间活跃Transformer层的数量来研究弹性深度。与ERNIE 5.0的配置一致，80%的训练样本保留全深度模型，而其余20%使用减少深度的子网络。如表9所示，弹性深度略微提升了全深度性能，这表明偶尔的层丢弃引入了正则化效果。此外，减少深度的子网络表现出平滑且可预测的性能下降，表明中间表示在层移除下保持鲁棒。总体而言，弹性深度提供了一种低风险且成本高效的机制，用于从单个预训练检查点派生出多个可部署的子模型。

items.en: Elastic Width. We next evaluate elasticity over MoE width. During training, 80% of samples retain all 64 experts, while the remaining 20% samples configurations with 32 experts. Table 10 shows that elastic width introduces only a slight degradation at full capacity. Although reduced-width configurations incur minor performance fluctuations of larger models, they remain functional without retraining, enabling deployment under strict memory constraints.
items.zh: 弹性宽度。接下来，我们评估MoE宽度上的弹性。在训练期间，80%的样本保留所有64个专家，而其余20%的样本使用32个专家的配置。表10显示，弹性宽度在全容量下仅引入轻微的性能下降。尽管减少宽度的配置在较大模型中会带来轻微的性能波动，但它们无需重新训练即可保持功能，从而能够在严格的内存约束下进行部署。

items.en: Elastic Sparsity. We also analyze elastic sparsity by varying routing top-kk at inference. During training, most instances are equipped with default configuration (k=8k=8), while the remaining instances are trained with reduced activated experts. As shown in Table 11, elastic top-kk training incurs a modest degradation under the full-activation configuration, while enabling stable and effective inference under substantially reduced routing budgets.
items.zh: 弹性稀疏性。我们还通过推理时改变路由top-k来分析弹性稀疏性。在训练期间，大多数实例配备默认配置（k=8），而其余实例使用减少的激活专家进行训练。如表11所示，弹性top-k训练在全激活配置下带来适度的性能下降，同时在显著减少的路由预算下实现稳定且有效的推理。

items.en: Beyond controlled-scale experiments, we further evaluate the effectiveness of elastic training on the pre-trained experimental model ERNIE 5.0-Exp-Base and its post-trained model ERNIE 5.0-Exp. Starting from ERNIE 5.0-Exp, we first analyze elastic sparsity by reducing the routing top-kk to 25% during inference. As summarized in Table 12, ERNIE 5.0-Exp-ES25.0% retains comparable performance across a wide range of text and visual benchmarks. The resulting accuracy drop remains minor, while the reduction in routing sparsity brings substantial efficiency gains, providing a more than 15% improvement in decoding speed. Moreover, we jointly activate elasticity along depth, width, and sparsity, deriving a compact pre-trained model from ERNIE 5.0-Exp-Base, which operates with only 53.7% of the activated parameters and 35.8% of the total parameters. Using the same data and training strategy for mid-training and post-training, we obtain the post-trained model, ERNIE 5.0-Exp-EA35.8%. Despite its substantially reduced computational footprint, the elastic variant achieves competitive performance across benchmarks, attaining an average score of 75.1775.17 compared to 75.5575.55 for the full ERNIE 5.0-Exp. Moreover, strong robustness on challenging reasoning and perception tasks, such as ZebraLogic and VisualPuzzle, indicates that elastic training effectively mitigates the performance degradation typically associated with aggressive reductions in computation and parameters.
items.zh: 除了受控规模实验外，我们还在预训练实验模型ERNIE 5.0-Exp-Base及其后训练模型ERNIE 5.0-Exp上进一步评估了弹性训练的有效性。从ERNIE 5.0-Exp开始，我们首先通过将推理时的路由top-k减少到25%来分析弹性稀疏性。如表12总结，ERNIE 5.0-Exp-ES25.0%在广泛的文本和视觉基准上保持了可比的性能。由此产生的准确率下降很小，而路由稀疏性的降低带来了显著的效率提升，解码速度提高了超过15%。此外，我们联合激活了深度、宽度和稀疏性上的弹性，从ERNIE 5.0-Exp-Base派生出一个紧凑的预训练模型，该模型仅使用53.7%的激活参数和35.8%的总参数。使用相同的数据和训练策略进行中期训练和后训练，我们获得了后训练模型ERNIE 5.0-Exp-EA35.8%。尽管其计算开销大幅减少，但弹性变体在基准测试中取得了有竞争力的性能，平均得分为75.17，而完整ERNIE 5.0-Exp为75.55。此外，在具有挑战性的推理和感知任务（如ZebraLogic和VisualPuzzle）上表现出的强鲁棒性表明，弹性训练有效缓解了通常与激进的计算和参数缩减相关的性能下降。

items.en: Overall, these results highlight that elasticity is not merely as a post-hoc compression technique, but a principled training paradigm. By jointly optimizing depth, width, and sparsity during pre-training and, the elastic model learns to redistribute representational capacity across layers and modalities, leading to favorable performance–efficiency trade-offs.
items.zh: 总体而言，这些结果强调弹性不仅仅是一种事后压缩技术，而是一种原则性的训练范式。通过在预训练期间联合优化深度、宽度和稀疏性，弹性模型学会了跨层和模态重新分配表示容量，从而实现了有利的性能-效率权衡。

items.en: We introduce ERNIE 5.0, a natively unified foundation model that integrates multimodal understanding and generation of text, image, video, and audio with a shared next-group-of-tokens prediction objective. To the best of our knowledge, ERNIE 5.0 represents the first realization of multimodal understanding and generation within a unified, trillion-level autoregressive framework. An ultra-sparse mixture-of-experts architecture with modality-agnostic expert routing enables scalable cross-modal modeling without relying on modality-specific designs. We explore a novel elastic training paradigm that supports flexible deployment configurations within a single pre-trained model, which is proved successful to maintain both training efficiency and performances. We also address key challenges in reinforcement learning for large-scale multimodal models and ensure pos-training stability and efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive and balanced performance across modalities. Overall, the results indicate that autoregressive unified multimodal and elastic pre-training provides a scalable pathway toward the next generation of foundational models.
items.zh: 我们介绍了ERNIE 5.0，这是一个原生统一的基础模型，通过共享的下一组词预测目标，集成了文本、图像、视频和音频的多模态理解与生成。据我们所知，ERNIE 5.0代表了在统一的万亿级自回归框架内首次实现多模态理解与生成。一种具有模态无关专家路由的超稀疏混合专家架构，无需依赖特定模态的设计即可实现可扩展的跨模态建模。我们探索了一种新颖的弹性训练范式，支持在单个预训练模型内灵活部署配置，并被证明成功保持了训练效率和性能。我们还解决了大规模多模态模型强化学习中的关键挑战，并确保了后训练的稳定性和效率。大量实验证明了跨模态的竞争性和均衡性能。总体而言，结果表明自回归统一多模态和弹性预训练为下一代基础模型提供了一条可扩展的路径。
